[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkcGOmzAQhp8GbkZ4DCQ5cNgE2LTqNhVtcugFGXsI7oJBxnTF29cg1EMrjSzN98_8mhljSpPkBHHowpdpBJw2wlcphACUQhSGITAImppyZDRicQ0Ys5MXhdhz1QWNQbSt0u9opMuXQAy936bRUfA4Ph4pJpSHvD7ULBI0gTiJQ9lI8Lu0tXacPPbiQeFiQjEbDD6UNihXE8cs8p60aCbRYkeUFo6ZWQ9NQ3puxEDMXKuBDN3Sj0oQ47Fitn01DbMR6LHM4G8PkhUJ3o9cPfUKN4OtcxfXMpbtLo71KNXcO7Rt6MAkXLIfhFXXvPx-ueZfqjyvih9ZVd6_3oqCvL2Ulxsp7-dPt6rMH6u0-__nt000aIvaOqpFR6bXa_R5-dVeIydXulPSCf_AVkl3ruz80MVy-vnNN6kcP1TXqSk5uO94bt-xXt_t2qlmSb3D2QPY2gC2Q8Ns2YPf729mIdG7Jq_xA56rCBf32mXEv5W7SbDPDN4h-wPXda95)

It's time for some honest talk, Friend.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkUFvnDAQhX-NuRnBGFjtgUN2gSZS061Idw-9IK89LE6wQcY04t_XIJRDK40s-Xue5_Ez5nGWHSGNfAUyT4DHrQhUDhFAHEMSRREwCNt7zJHFCUvvgCk7kiRCzVUfthbRdcp8oJV-v4Ri0EGXs1TcU8EZjyHjvgcSISOMkUueRf7GoM8758aJsCcCla8JxWwx_FTGolxNPHPINe3QTqLDniojPLOzGdqWam7FQO18VwMd-kWPSlBLWDU73UzDbAUSVlj8QyBbkeB65OphVrgZbJ27uB5jxe7imUapZu3R9kIPJuE3eyCseS7rt_Nz-b0py6b6VTT19celqujrU32-0Pp6erk0dXlbpd3_P79tosE4NM5TI3o6F4ekO77x99rLjemV9MI_sFPSx1WcbqZajr9_BjaX46fqezVlB_8dj-071vT9W3vVLjk5nAjA1gawBQ2zYzd-vb7ahSYfhn5Lb_BYRTj71S0jfp3cTcJ9ZiCH4i-WV6_M)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT →**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkcGOnDAMhp8GbkHEAaZz4LAzQLdSt1OxHVTtBUFihnRJQCF0xds3INRDK1mR_P32L9vBlCbJGeLQhS_SCBracV-mEAJQClEYhsAg6FraIKMRi1vAmJ29KETVyCHoDKLtpX5HI1y-BnxUfp9GiIKiQMA25pR-Crs2gViE7dm1txT9Ie2tnWaPPXlQuJiRLwaDD6kNis3EMYuNIj2amfc4EKm5Y2bRY9cR1Rg-ErO0ciTjsKpJcmI8VixW1fO4GI4eywz-9iDZEG_U1MiH3uBusHce4lbGssPFMYVCLsqhfUMHZu6S4yCsfs7L1-tz_rXO87r4kdXl_dutKMjLU3m9kfJ--XKry7zapMP_P799olFb1NZRzQdSvf16PUVV9nNycq0HKZzwD-ylcOfKLpUu1vPbd9-kYvqQwyDn5OS-47F_x3Z9t-sguzX1ThcPYG8D2A8Ni2VVc7-_mJVE75p8jit4bCJc3WvXCf9WHibBMTN4p-wPcGuwTA)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th – but only with your help, Friend.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkU2PnDAMhn8N3ILA4WM4cJgZYHfV7k7LdEZVLygkZogWAgrQFf31DQj1sJWsSH5e-5XtYOKFYQyBa8IWiQ_Mq7ktE3ABPA9813WBglNXHkPq-TSoAAMaW76LHZOtU2vEqZHqHbUw-eLwvrOb5OB6sYeIIoogqELBqxojdgj88MBEHFO7TZppGkaLHi3ITYzIZ43Oh1QaxWpi2ISsIw3qkTfYEqm4YXpWfV2TjmneEz1Xsid9u3SD5ERbNJ-nrhz7WXO0aKrxtwXhijjrBiYfaoWbwda5i2sZTXcXwzoUcu4M2jY0YOQm2Q9Cy-esuJ6fs69llpX5j7Qsbm-XPCevx-J8IcXt9HIpi-y-Srv_f37bRL2aUE2GKt6St-vP5nr88mf8buRStVIY4RNspDDnSk93lS_xr2-2TsTwIdtWjmFkvuOxfcd6fbNrK-slsaKTBbC1AWyHhnmid3a7veqF-O-KPAV3eKwinM07LQP-q9xNnH1msKL0L_r4sGg)**

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Happy Thanksgiving 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2a631d52291e4db0a703088ae39e2696&_e=laJsGCH_5_V3vNGDOzQ8dVFVtcFpdUfS9z5t7IaaIywpzUfMJl26Pra3LHRSakEsCAJrwhBCs53AtqHioyNRFY3rsiVrW8MK04iLFHSLoApJHkFfmCn0hx_mZYMLtEic-FuxjkETgioIW7EfJsUy2ILtQOz6HQhQEGTJ-61eOBWZT49iPoUe-kyODZA2W8ad9Tt5rfM8Cfc4yrj5O9PZJ9hh3V4TsDJcN04PXIEZXrmF0koMxkwh0-U8iUhAQysls64KLgrK65_1FOq8hL9_NXnP7DB4KemqrbhdGBm_cOxMK1aB6AmAiEU63hF2I8JhiNtGvILvXkHs1qKVmhd4dQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Happy Thanksgiving 🦃**
---
| |
---
I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving before the holiday hullabaloo gets started.
In our current political climate, it’s easy to focus on the things we’re upset about. Trust me; I could name a few. But I think it’s important to keep our chins up and reflect on all the things we are grateful for—and there’s no better time than Thanksgiving.
This year (like every year), I’m thankful for my family first and foremost. My amazing wife Kelly is my rock and an incredible mother to our daughter, Isabel (AKA “the boss”), who makes me so so proud. This summer, Isabel had a medical scare and had to have surgery. While she is still not cleared to get back on her horse, I am so grateful everyone is healthy and home.
I also want to send a huge “thank you” to the people of Tennessee. It is the honor of my life to serve as your congressman and fight for you. I’m not a big fan of Washington, but I love Tennessee, and I love representing East Tennessee.
Of course, I am thankful to be an American. Waking up each morning in the greatest country on Earth is a blessing that we owe to the sacrifice of the men and women in our armed services.
So while you gather around the dining room table tomorrow, think about what you are thankful for. I hope you and your family have a wonderful Thanksgiving.
---
| | |
---
| | **Feeding Folks For The Holidays 🧡**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2a631d52291e4db0a703088ae39e2696&_e=laJsGCH_5_V3vNGDOzQ8dW7UMKij0CUngk4P4M0rj80jfxmblUPTI1MGtbKYnNxwFwI_TqOeKWrSjRmk7KacRwwg4oRvDLHNrf-PloMBM_muIuzW_ThWVaamKrLhdpEqKzY-dQLya7xP5iQTB5kHFOo95ZloyAzOR3Wvg2nMQqbBeNhHzUUSxLOMZh9og_ouu54khX3zZHamFuoETHbcDaWIa99lCg1a2c-zsUzp8cZVSmfwii8CMpe3p0AaxItCwEHQjpyABPW0VhrNoNe1BNesSKrw6vU3qaRihYmhfVlWCbb0Bw6fOuIptc3tWBCTnLw4v3uGTR_c5962WLNlS00fR_i_LwZDbwX5yaOiWgM%3D)
---
Grocery prices this year are at an all-time high, and folks need help. Thankfully, there are plenty of food pantries around East Tennessee that can help. For a comprehensive list of available food, click [here.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2a631d52291e4db0a703088ae39e2696&_e=laJsGCH_5_V3vNGDOzQ8dW7UMKij0CUngk4P4M0rj80jfxmblUPTI1MGtbKYnNxwFwI_TqOeKWrSjRmk7KacRwwg4oRvDLHNrf-PloMBM_muIuzW_ThWVaamKrLhdpEqKzY-dQLya7xP5iQTB5kHFOo95ZloyAzOR3Wvg2nMQqbBeNhHzUUSxLOMZh9og_ouu54khX3zZHamFuoETHbcDd8rSbNeF8sdfsAibnEwEzjpHYYTI_43DasUsUpcf6XIaXzYD95w14ltBygLH6k3kEmGb4ReofSttWXriYtH242iQC082GKcUSZoW1DCOouNCDKo0cM1EXF9JXM5u2qJQo7gCK9Li-jNGK3Ps8hwtU4%3D)

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Happy Thanksgiving 🦃 | | I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving before the holiday hullabaloo gets started. In our current political climate, it’s easy to focus on the things we’re upset about. Trust me; I could name a few. But I think it’s important to keep our chins up and reflect on all the things we are grateful for—and there’s no better time than Thanksgiving. This year (like every year), I’m thankful for my family first and foremost. My amazing wife Kelly is my rock and an incredible mother to our daughter, Isabel (AKA “the boss”), who makes me so so proud. This summer, Isabel had a medical scare and had to have surgery. While she is still not cleared to get back on her horse, I am so grateful everyone is healthy and home. I also want to send a huge “thank you” to the people of Tennessee. It is the honor of my life to serve as your congressman and fight for you. I’m not a big fan of Washington, but I love Tennessee, and I love representing East Tennessee. Of course, I am thankful to be an American. Waking up each morning in the greatest country on Earth is a blessing that we owe to the sacrifice of the men and women in our armed services. So while you gather around the dining room table tomorrow, think about what you are thankful for. I hope you and your family have a wonderful Thanksgiving. | | | | | Feeding Folks For The Holidays 🧡 | | Grocery prices this year are at an all-time high, and folks need help. Thankfully, there are plenty of food pantries around East Tennessee that can help. For a comprehensive list of available food, click | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → That’s one way to wake up 😂😅 ()→ Heartfelt reunion 👏🥰 ()→ Jack Frost’s work in real time ❄️😟 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was recently in Georgia because it’s THAT important. You should help, too. |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1b7be69b6c8c442697e74711b600f5e3&_e=kPBZPFnZQnTDRwhzjJjXbkKEt-9HB1e-2x971XwcTR6FWoXEhoUz4CE_U42KNCKCFBx9PO8fLguRMDiyTdJU1xXqqXXQJV7y-79jrL3DywKlwGsTbulobnJ4mUSUGS912OzcD_0td-bS1xQxCj5ThmOLBYLalU4s00OHRQIXblUA-LnP1fzP3Qh7L1h5_eY3MyzcpOfp72s5eOTY6iYlYra2ux0erFczw26LILdnu9BcuOZrDL5lw4VcCoERVlXnPudyTZDws9MJyx5bICOg6DNMUKptzSPBcX5A17hL4Rn1bOaioZuVRRPz0S8Ua2bnF_VW4dT1PMOS88I8lZX0-oeZMiyk3EUm2ukZcsJ4zZrTysJPdmd2ofd09KrHD1FKUH-wizKE573zDczFFb3Yz5IMurI3_-G-3dFGGIUfDSc0vcfMeAT2_aJQzhANbs9t)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948591:J6FNaCGjN:m:1:3345639852:8CDDD0F171CC3251E953D8279AD7B2C6:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948591:J6FNaCGjN:m:1:3345639852:8CDDD0F171CC3251E953D8279AD7B2C6:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948591:J6FNaCGjN:m:1:3345639852:8CDDD0F171CC3251E953D8279AD7B2C6:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948591:J6FNaCGjN:m:1:3345639852:8CDDD0F171CC3251E953D8279AD7B2C6:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948755:J7lYaCGNs:m:1:3331421248:26550D6E35F9EB07438A2AFD3D1A537F:r)**

**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948755:J7lYaCGNs:m:1:3331421248:26550D6E35F9EB07438A2AFD3D1A537F:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948755:J7lYaCGNs:m:1:3331421248:26550D6E35F9EB07438A2AFD3D1A537F:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 13 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948828:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948829:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948830:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948831:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948832:JDE3aCGQN:m:1:3317145305:00DC32B5767D5F0FDA4454A107EFFA56:r)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r)
---

---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948006:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948007:6ZfMaCGNP:m:1:3331703221:4D7BEEB7B4F933D71406D905F1720C68:r)

Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Asking from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948034:JdtXaCGsN:m:1:3253819041:F93FB7C31B6898736DDC3637F860574E:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61949867:6kHAPCGjN:m:1:3317145305:6D7958BD9313DAE216A675C84B6D4C03:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Happy Thanksgiving 🍁 🍂
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I want to take a moment to pause and be thankful! |

---
---
Fellow American - Happy Thanksgiving!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61171478:s65JvLDiN:m:1:877327319:21BDE6F3600CB9B2F85607D5FB34B293:r)
_(Don't worry, I'm not asking for money today!)_

**I want to thank you for supporting Republican candidates and the conservative movement this past year. I know I called on the help of Team Graham a lot in 2022, but you always came through when we needed you.**

We had some wins, a few losses, and a runoff in Georgia, but we couldn't have done anything without the support of generous conservatives.

Thank you for being by my side this year. I am thankful to have the support of folks like you, Fellow American. **I'm truly blessed that you're on Team Graham.**

As you enjoy this Thanksgiving holiday, I hope you'll take time to count your blessings and remember our First Responders and those in our Armed Forces who are away from their families throughout the holiday season.

There is a tremendous amount to be thankful for when we pause and reflect. We are blessed to live in an amazing nation where we can chart our own future and live freely.

Have a safe and happy holiday season!

Lindsey Graham

* * *
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61171478:s65JvLDiN:m:1:877327319:21BDE6F3600CB9B2F85607D5FB34B293:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61171478:s65JvLDiN:m:1:877327319:21BDE6F3600CB9B2F85607D5FB34B293:r)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948823:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948824:JlRHPCGtN:m:1:3331421248:3D9E731A97261DC249AB5C657E0288D5:r)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948597:6oZfPCGNH:m:1:3359512271:A0BFBA94558F19269CFF8E414AA949D9:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948597:6oZfPCGNH:m:1:3359512271:A0BFBA94558F19269CFF8E414AA949D9:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948597:6oZfPCGNH:m:1:3359512271:A0BFBA94558F19269CFF8E414AA949D9:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948597:6oZfPCGNH:m:1:3359512271:A0BFBA94558F19269CFF8E414AA949D9:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948597:6oZfPCGNH:m:1:3359512271:A0BFBA94558F19269CFF8E414AA949D9:r) **
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6488%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=vGRkkpsBNlaLFnFTo%2b4SRg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84568%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9nTQvXjHaZUhJ9jF7%2bWyKQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84569%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sHfg8w5KrCZU73MmY%2bFgPQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84569%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sHfg8w5KrCZU73MmY%2bFgPQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6488%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=vGRkkpsBNlaLFnFTo%2b4SRg&sysid=1)_

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z59ov522t6tacm0gvam3249l3i7d16r81m2275t8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2chh2bs)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zafmatksr4l3qoag74763k3lr9fr8dunvhs7vbs8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2chh2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zms4saar6fv5hk2j0jjj9fncq824p20puotud9ng_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2chh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

|

Dear Friend,
On this Thanksgiving Day I wanted to take a moment to reflect of the blessings of God in each of our lives. We have much to be thankful for in America.
As we join with families and friends on this special day let us remember the first Thanksgiving. The Pilgrims and their struggles in Plymouth Colony and the events leading up to the first Thanksgiving. Despite their struggles, they were a grateful people. They offered prayers and thanks for all the bountiful blessings God had so generously provided.
Let us take the time to do the same as we celebrate with family and friends.
Have a wonderful Thanksgiving.
Caroline Colarusso

---
|

---

body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoh6t3uvoeoeni5272vmtgvta5lubs2aqp3u45o0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zct6156ivmch8v1tbgejjujev02r5deg9ejjjok0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zes8kn6t8v47irin38p6phf5duvm9l8m0vseooe8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948116:6K-LfCGNF:m:1:3331703221:80A184956612F71CA52FA7B08169EF6B:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 12 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948116:6K-LfCGNF:m:1:3331703221:80A184956612F71CA52FA7B08169EF6B:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948116:6K-LfCGNF:m:1:3331703221:80A184956612F71CA52FA7B08169EF6B:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948116:6K-LfCGNF:m:1:3331703221:80A184956612F71CA52FA7B08169EF6B:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0171%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1Fi8gbtjyoSFwB52I5mTng&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41753%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2byTgJe20jKcshm3Un8NhIw&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sIlL1XqH0iFNHTqFJFKKcg&sysid=1) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0IKQ9UsnkHayDo3MyRCn1g&sysid=1) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NJALSizl6hnQNX4Y4RvSsg&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs97lae062a5cabamivag1526nak3r70f8hg9eg8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. ---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitli9rlkn9l61p0plse2nod0hacl4h6p5efhv20_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3nfca1u6tvpro7gu2mjkr6pj4nc66tct5q3cbh8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
