All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0acqq1umrj0dgr998gh0jqmq6pn0bp7m03p05d8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4clh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgdlke0sgc1bv86nh0bs4um4vpvmulhqueu12jdo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvigljr90v2o4q40e5j7eciekikd9l7j7mvejgfo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HI5kRRYMOVlGurGgGhFsRdupvbvVO59mowDqhu84NYElRqFOgbqN1hfFOpQdlJPYvxtWW1shIVc_hyUk0yDS3r8wi9pMF1-Yt-sD4rup053Exic7uznPbmd9sC6g0HKxcug_aWpoEXTRBUCdq65E1Q==&c=pi4umT0hdRHp3lLWThX7NzSHyT9WtKnrVEDnMC24nVWMsViEPEz7dQ==&ch=RvRI4Qj32CsfW08CngXnKN9_RFyIO86lQZDqgxRLQl1tWZGNgdk6wg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
Americans have been celebrating Thanksgiving for over 230 years, and it has been celebrated as an official national holiday since 1942. However, this significant day began long before that - dating back to 1621. Thanksgiving remains one of the most special holidays of the year, so let's take a moment to reflect on the historical significance as we prepare a meal and gather with family and friends.
While you are enjoying some delicious turkey, potatoes, gravy, cranberry sauce, and pie - make sure you also reaffirm all that you are thankful for. For me, I am thankful to serve as your State Senator. I am incredibly thankful to have served my country. I am thankful to live in our community, which looks out for each other. And I am thankful for the family, friends, and loved ones that I celebrate this great holiday with.
I hope you enjoy this day surrounded by the ones you love. From my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Rob Ortt
---
| |
---

body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7588%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2b5ASJ%2fihe%2buyqEwKfOSPZw&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77271%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Dlc64DO0tAmleclIWgIXQ&sysid=1)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77272%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C%2f6pZBpO7KGKut7yTOUh0A&sysid=1)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77273%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HfzK00Fdi4p2uSC5zNVl4g&sysid=1)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77272%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C%2f6pZBpO7KGKut7yTOUh0A&sysid=1)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77274%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3ZQCGxJWaxhirKxSPAGaxw&sysid=1)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77285%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pmX005koCdwHUk%2bxIzymyw&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77270%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5OIBBmI%2fe6FwwiU9DOi%2fgw&sysid=1)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY →**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77286%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RBpmRtt92yCyHv3YEeVPVw&sysid=1)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Who are the real racists?
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6kat1ool21j13jeohoic3pe5i2tj73jmtt3a0jg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)

Hey Friend,

Who are the real racists in America?

The people trying to hold Black people accountable to lift themselves out of poverty through enterprise and hard work?

_**Or those telling Black people that they are forever victims and can't get ahead in life, so they need to depend on the government and rich liberals?**_

The answer? The latter group.

The media, academic institutions, and the radicals all treat Black people like they can't achieve anything on their own.

They're turning victimhood into a nationwide epidemic.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum. I co-founded BLEXIT with Candace Owens. Our mission is to change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities -- with a particular focus on Black Americans.

This month, one of our goals is to raise $50,000 to support our mission of uplifting Black and minority communities.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to stop modern racism? All you have to do is donate any amount today. Click here to join our mission >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoj7kic8t9fjbe0351rmfqof8529ar1p9rousdeo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)

This is deeply personal to me.

I served in the Tucson Police Department as a SWAT operator, field training officer, general instructor, and Public Information Officer.

I've patrolled the streets and interacted with these communities.

And I saw young men and women who believed they were hopeless because all they heard was, _" You're helpless," "You can't do that because of your skin color,"_ and _ "You won't achieve anything."_

But that's not true, and we're here to prove it!

**BLEXIT is doing things no other organization in the country is doing.** We work with communities that are often ignored and provide opportunities for leaders to step forward to make our country a better place.

We are empowering Black communities to abolish the mainstream narrative of the victimhood mentality.

[_**Can you help share the truth -- that these young men and women can achieve anything -- with a gift of $10, $35, or any amount? **__**Click here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ao5tqtqoiu467be9mub5soo9b6v167bf3qs65o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)

BLEXIT's programs give people the opportunity to shape their futures
and pursue the American Dream. All while championing our values of**faith, family, and freedom** to empower Black and urban communities.

It is our goal to lift up these urban communities.

Friend, I am personally asking you to help make this goal a reality.

Supporting BLEXIT means you're supporting your fellow Americans as they
change the narrative that's holding them back.

Can you send your urgent donation today to meet our fundraising goal?

[**Donate $10 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ln36ltbk153kfr799nallc3dhu62fjtj793rbo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9k0lcblg4nn3fsrnbgael5hjd8rjr0s8d3i1mc0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3v7po3481a0snmtp0395jha9lj69p77a1m0vi5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8fs0106263ouvecir9ep5sjqiteskk6vp17ceo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanuv87t88kpjgq75bco2n5nvpthd65sndvghap8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7o5lb80hb9qo6cuttkcvr4bfslq00e5bv633j0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpus4blvqgug8g0g35mu8pkjtn1g54rs0k0on9p8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate $2,500 >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3lviierai3hn5mrttsp002iqs95ftoa95u5g4o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj0qg298kmkahjo32v5is4kmd695b8kth52jspf0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsfmmoge9nitnbe12c9hgbpebnjo8uf3aadgqifo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0qsp784k3u3flh32gi3krrgtm86rh1btelkjgko_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7q6hatasd8a66r1p8bml8v07bm81cett0cb74g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9geeor2cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950577:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950578:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950579:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950580:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950581:JEtxfCGMN:m:1:3331421248:79F8A34ED0898B98B29C042E4978E088:r)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z15tgiveh12kqchuo6m23rodg8ef3a7o66vevdt8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb5b5s3t677gllr74urer9ohkuborjb16lj884l0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj8efnd9f3ns0m5oga43usc5squj9cuvinh65tl0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4v21eom06dnae3srft8p64liffsgtd721oh75no_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2f9537hj4enqcuom2ee1eotk8de5ufj57ujjhg0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze9dk08ab93ifeoit561lg5rf8iobnkkaunl1dmg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34cph2bs)

subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu53o69ojrdjtmaad79a1qh1q1fbsg8ajem9iu70_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2cqdjkff6tu8572ies3tti83h60orphakj1p14o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4mgm5eal6ri8m2geuds4dskroh5mhus5rh4ffuo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmu74fdutg42mv4142g8o4rcsu9h728eo89gmqvg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zikp611t2fihdqjp9713nrark568nqk6iiajo1jo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zremo63qnnfqfdfv9v3v09jhn85kcd2lv0ou5lno_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z23vs4v8kftjchp971bvr8kc1p68b9kouf8p83t8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9nvtnh4734k7l5ba70ua8qcvogcpnmkk596el58_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf62knarbt017ra13vtv974jrt7c9d0pfm8c4628_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrbbpvn8ht4g9iadh25q0d8fj27ntqnuvurhel90_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za6j0rhu5ogil1qpfgesjk87vc6cgtl3mh14e2ro_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziprd4avltp44oouigfjn476j69fmctg6vin2nk0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zseiuiv777ujbnkb7m6luo9n2h3bqef2f956ook0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z090dbe9do5jqam0ajth155bhu7cnkoddt1ujf0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhtukgajj92dt27tfut95liovmksrdtdla60h2ho_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrm8sb1tanv0m6mkvkpi6smv079872uv91c1coug_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9v4tj9u2qs1ho77ikh75tlb93v6gblp2uh48sgg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsruq61ietvtqu9h2cvh7cg7adsqodqa8d3m6ns0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ieco34c9h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zfkd3v2rkcujpv7b0n1oo94sa78kscsvq52u5pdo).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0oaq42b39jkbuup73of9vkge8b7vehbqo96uqgg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjh69pj0chh649fg)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950587:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950588:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950589:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950590:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950591:6yzvMCGKN:m:1:3374012347:034BCCB75B225C26CF5A8AB195DB92E4:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Georgia or bust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6489%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=0QzbKuz0IC%2bo0fGYOLBuTw&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84562%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NPZ76Boa8%2ffPAK9Y%2fGJylQ&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84563%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mKp%2f%2b5JbsSdtclcJk9zxIA&sysid=1) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84564%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yStFpCLXvXN6xpCZdGEzKA&sysid=1) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84575%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jPAr9migJkPPvYVk5YduWA&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84577%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xWkkPgtuXCmLWLk9endI0A&sysid=1) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84578%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rkcEoc%2bKBtrdEPmtH58saw&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84579%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0atHJR2E6mvoL6DNdKwynA&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84570%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y9ub6yWHwi3ZC1Gn%2bHTU%2fQ&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84576%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hA8nkJgsp1eyIegroY%2fwQ&sysid=1)** To your survival,

While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]()** Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. **_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body: [INSIDE JW] Happy Thanksgiving! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=28486&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1QOGhURl91TW1MYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] Each year I like to remind our supporters to recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=11088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxpbW90aC5vcmcvbGVhcm4vanVzdC1raWRzL2hvbWV3b3JrLWhlbHAvd2hvLXdlcmUtcGlsZ3JpbXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE] describes: > Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from > scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet > weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea diet was > very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey > and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died > each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people > survived the first year in Plymouth. When _Mayflower_ left Plymouth > on April 5, 1621, she sailed back to England with only half of her > crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving. It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. And as President Washington reminded Americans in his 1789 first Thanksgiving Proclamation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=21332&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3VuZGVycy5hcmNoaXZlcy5nb3YvZG9jdW1lbnRzL1dhc2hpbmd0b24vMDUtMDQtMDItMDA5MT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=], we must also pray for good, constitutional government: > ...beseech him to pardon our national and other transgressions—to > enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our > several and relative duties properly and punctually—to render our > national government a blessing to all the people, by constantly > being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws, > discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed... As I reflect on this, I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our just cause [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] and for your many messages of encouragement, you send to me and my hard-working Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations,” work for a “wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots of our great nation. Thank you for your continued support [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] and, on behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving! Until next week, [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61177&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=61177&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=61177&AGENCY=jw&]
clean_body: [INSIDE JW] Happy Thanksgiving! [=] Each year I like to remind our supporters to recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [] describes: Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea diet was very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people survived the first year in Plymouth. When Mayflower left Plymouth on April 5, 1621, she sailed back to England with only half of her crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving. It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. And as President Washington reminded Americans in his 1789 first Thanksgiving Proclamation [=], we must also pray for good, constitutional government: ...beseech him to pardon our national and other transgressions—to enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our several and relative duties properly and punctually—to render our national government a blessing to all the people, by constantly being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws, discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed... As I reflect on this, I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our just cause [==] and for your many messages of encouragement, you send to me and my hard-working Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations,” work for a “wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots of our great nation. Thank you for your continued support [==] and, on behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving! name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to raise $30,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950597:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950598:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950599:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950600:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950601:6BNVzCGON:m:1:3317145305:9E72F1C42A690ED9ED3F2DF08ECD483C:r)

body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 13 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948926:JZE-zCGlN:m:1:3331703221:F943974D1DF3FC9111EC7F09310C3161:r)
Herschel Walker

name: 1600 Daily
subject: We're thankful for YOU!
body:
During this time of Thanksgiving, the team at PragerU wants freedom-loving Americans to know how grateful we are for YOU.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmlbudl2djjmj6aqs62v77gle487gf7h3l4j91do_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie6or2cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvce4q2bvqfjbadmutd5or248qe4eeces1grsv80_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie6or2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Patriot, During this time of Thanksgiving, the team at PragerU wants freedom-loving Americans to know how grateful we are for YOU. This year, PragerU promised America’s families that we’d deliver patriotic resources to inoculate our children from the left’s lies—and, thanks to our donors, we’re delivering on that promise. Generous tax-deductible donations are the reason PragerU can continue reaching millions of young people with our shared values.
---
[**Help us reach millions more young people**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zotk2t6ra586j69t22b8v5odgnjf9o62nv673k68_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie6or2cth2bs)
---
The left is working overtime to influence young minds from kindergarten to post-grad. PragerU is providing the antidote that millions are turning to for help. With the addition of PragerU Kids, PragerU is now producing entertaining, pro-American content for every age—teaching youth to be grateful for our country’s history, traditions, and founding principles. Parents and young people from all over the country write to us. They tell us how thankful they are for our wholesome, truthful, commonsense content. This gratitude fuels our spirits and energizes the PragerU staff every day.
---
We realize the fight ahead is daunting. Knowing you stand with us makes all the difference. [If you haven’t yet given to PragerU this year, please give today. Your tax-deductible support will allow PragerU to double down on everything you care about.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z48g2chloemgk31n3s83lbj8lvfu4km1nr4lkb7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie6or2cth2bs) If you have already given, thank you, and please consider forwarding this email to your friends and family. Only banded together can we save America. From the PragerU family to yours, thank you, and have a blessed Thanksgiving with your loved ones. Gratefully,Your PragerU Team
---
[**Donate Now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm187gjkd42j82nv52sj9ovn68hkf5uvrn0s4dgg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie6or2cth2bs)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: giving thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I hope your day, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude.

| Friend,

Happy Thanksgiving!

**I had to take a moment to tell you how thankful I am to have you on this team. With your support, we flipped a crucial House seat from red to blue and elected West Michigan’s first-ever Democratic Congresswoman – that is no small feat!**

I also want to say how thankful I am to my biggest supporters: my husband Jesse and our sons, James and Wesley. I could not be here without them by my side.

I hope your day, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude.

With so much appreciation,
Hillary [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55025649/380437479/-1904168371?refcode=BLU-HSC-20221124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzlhNDljMC0wMDZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6gDx__-WAw17qCKnS2LRgrQZzxMyeaMRJnKFrAVw9k=)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952125:68ZJnCGxN:m:1:3331421248:ACFB8A29D50F51F91FC5146AE43CBC2D:r)
---
