subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsm256o2rdcfe8ibcdfq3sefb08eajrch7366f38_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrfbcs2q3po68eqsptog3q2ov8bfbqhm2obtfedg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87pg7d3hrb7jmgvo3t1i6s350jc91gptk7rq6oo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt8ulv20t9dc6mlupbtsli4j4lmitf5logleqigg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zurte3qe4kma03b2r0n556r6odtki65t25v0sld0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlpq4psimhg15qdm311vs8osumdr4th9g592ke5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z73he2cuo19tknp517r9bm0rjtus4u85dqc01a18_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvg4pa7gbu12umgdk9qi3c0g3shrbbiaaoenq4r0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z689f41ai34gs4epohbk3ef4kmeu9ug1rui7dllo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5q1pfaoqn989b9r50ltei7mp2viqjtmo2gv39fg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2qim5mlqfv9o3rlnlfoutg2rgl2j87n06s2h4g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob4cph2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates

clean_body: Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo #1 Item to Hoard In 2022 Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. These Survival Food Kits Are Famous for Selling Out... Now They're Back in Stock! These best-selling kits are back in stock... and you'll get loaded up with when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. name: Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
subject: We are thankful for you!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,

As you celebrate Thanksgiving today with your family and friends, we wanted to use this as an opportunity to say thank you.

Because of you, Pride Fund is able to take on gun violence with a multi-faceted approach. We’re electing more Democrats who will stand up and be champions on the issues, we’re fighting for federal legislation at the Capitol, and we’re taking legal action in court to fight for stronger gun safety laws.

So this Thanksgiving, we’re giving thanks to you and all you do to support Pride Fund and this grassroots movement. Working together this year, we helped Democrats maintain control of the Senate and kept Republican gains in the House of Representative to a minimum. We ensured the predicted "Red Wave" didn't happen. Now, we must work together to ensure Senator Warnrock in Georgia wins re-election in the runoff Dec. 6th. The shooting this week at the LGBTQ bar, Club Q, in Colorado Springs that left 5 dead and 25 injured, made it abundantly clear that 6.5 years after the Pulse shooting in Orlando, the LGBTQ community is a still a target of hate and violence and gun reform is more important now than ever. It has only gotten worse from the hate that Donald Trump unleashed in office. Our work continues, thanks to you and your support and we can't be more proud of what we have accomplished together and that we are marching arm in arm towards a safer America. Thanks for all you do.

We look forward to continuing our work together to make America a safer, more equal country for all of us.

Best,
Pride Fund To End Gun Violence

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-thanksgiving

To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? Sign up here: act.myngp.com/Forms/-7357247923588756736

Hi Peter,

We wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving! We are so grateful for you and all Tennesseans each and every day. Because of you, we'll be able to keep organizing to put power back into the hands of working people.

We couldn't do this without you. Thank you again, and we hope you and your families have a restful holiday.

Grateful,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
This Thanksgiving, I have so much to be thankful for. From my incredible campaign team to the volunteers and organizers who worked tirelessly, and this grassroots team! I’m so thankful for all of you who supported this campaign and believed in me and my vision. | Before I sit down with my family to enjoy Thanksgiving dinner, I wanted to wish each and every one of you a happy and blessed Thanksgiving. This Thanksgiving, I have _so much_ to be thankful for. From my incredible campaign team, to the volunteers and organizers who worked tirelessly, and this grassroots team! I’m so thankful for all of you who supported this campaign and believed in me and my vision. Most importantly, I am grateful for the opportunity to serve Connecticut’s 5th District in the United States House of Representatives for a third term. The 2022 campaign season was long and tiring, and I hope you take today to eat good food, reconnect with family and friends, and rejuvenate for the journey ahead. These fights are not over. I will keep pushing for a woman’s right to choose, our hard-earned benefits and affordable health care, our planet, our democracy, our children, and our basic rights to safety and security. But today, I want to wish you and your family a safe and warm start to the holiday season. I am so thankful for your support. In gratitude, – Jahana
---
* * *

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqi1tidlb7u0oo1moj4fpid90ugd8rid2uon7hvg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zip63v9or31rnjfl3rqf9ebo34rltndijfkip6l0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfq88fdbec16i6toka84lbmtbol9g0ghp42n2g18_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs4opihk73ve4b66pbkbbgl05152dn592fd19890_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhjse6hi4v92r1hua3khj5gkc3gp4gme95k69kg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcc3nmuu9jf2js2u4mt52ib675f38de0rv2uttug_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9ie1ob0cdh2bs)
---

name: Senator Edwards Press
subject: Time to Reflect
body:
Happy Thanksgiving
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| PRESS RELEASE Senator Chuck Edwards
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 24, 2022
---
| Contact: [Heather Millett](mailto:heather.millett@ncleg.gov) (919) 733-5745
---
| | |
---
| Senator Chuck Edwards Wishes WNC A Happy Thanksgiving May God bless you, your family, and all you hold dear this holiday season.
---
| | |
---
| Raleigh, N.C. - Sen. Chuck Edwards (R-Henderson) wishes WNC citizens a Happy Thanksgiving.
Senator Edwards said, "Thanksgiving is a time to stop and reflect on the blessings we have in our life, and this holiday season I have a lot to be thankful for. Most notably, my family, loved ones, and the WNC community who continues to place trust in me as their representative in the legislature. I am thankful for each and every one of you! Wishing you the best this Thanksgiving. May God bless & protect you, your family, and all whom you hold dear."
Happy Thanksgiving!
---
|
---
| ###
---
| | |
---
| | | | FOLLOW US

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952075:J8CABCGWN:m:1:3317145305:2595FD1B0DE56C91BF2A96DDCE91EF46:r)

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0173%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZtK5UBZE%2fH7HwFGxMdO%2fhw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41775%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7mFkLzcJE7Wgow4kxXDusA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41776%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aKINEMMs3%2fGeelbnS4UVFg&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HevlaZQIRXBZjePIZtDdSQ&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41778%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vV%2fQE13FkzB8sg3iwdavSg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nMrRFc%2bzYkoG43dEssU7Uw&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Have a safe and happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030564/380458091/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdiYmNiNS0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2W4Z18hAt95zkLLP1Napu0QemoFY_sVfalyLnbEL0=&emci=98bbcbf8-996a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=647bbcb5-086c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15384964)
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

This year I continue to be grateful to live in Rhode Island, a state with incredible, hard working, creative people. It has been a privilege to fight for Rhode Islanders as Treasurer, and I am excited to bring that fight to Washington DC as your next Congressional representative.

I am grateful for my wife, Julia, and our son, Max. I'm thankful for their love and support throughout this last year, and I'm looking forward to having the chance to spend the day together as a family.

I'm also incredibly grateful for you, Peter. The support you offered to our campaign over the last year has meant so much to me. We couldn't have won this race to bring Rhode Island values to Washington without you. I am grateful to have the opportunity to continue our fight to expand access to affordable health care, defend reproductive rights, protect Social Security and Medicare, and more.

No matter how you're celebrating this year, I hope you and your loved ones have a happy and healthy Thanksgiving.

Thank you!

Seth

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030569/380458107/-915500772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdiYmNiNS0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2W4Z18hAt95zkLLP1Napu0QemoFY_sVfalyLnbEL0=&emci=98bbcbf8-996a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=647bbcb5-086c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030578/380458122/-883321303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdiYmNiNS0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2W4Z18hAt95zkLLP1Napu0QemoFY_sVfalyLnbEL0=&emci=98bbcbf8-996a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=647bbcb5-086c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030582/380458133/-108087027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdiYmNiNS0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2W4Z18hAt95zkLLP1Napu0QemoFY_sVfalyLnbEL0=&emci=98bbcbf8-996a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=647bbcb5-086c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15384964)

name: Congressman Dan Kildee
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Friends,

Thanksgiving is a chance to reflect on what we are grateful for. Today and every day, I am thankful for my family, friends, and you — my amazing supporters. Thank you for standing with me in this tough race and inspiring me to keep fighting for Michigan families in Congress.

It’s an honor to work every day to make our communities a better place to live, work, and raise a family.

From my family to yours, wishing you a wonderful and safe Thanksgiving with family and friends.

Sincerely,

Dan

---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: what I’m thankful for this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I have so much to be thankful for this year, and I wanted to share a few things on my list.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030991/380459144/-2130083693?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGJjNjhkOC0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnzN3Q6F5l8hc8jBbto8i8HGbGE763oBcvZAbmayn54=)
---
| Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you are able to celebrate with loved ones and delicious food. I have so much to be thankful for this year, and I wanted to share a few things on my list.

**I am thankful** for the opportunity to continue serving the community I love in Congress.

**I am thankful** for every member of this grassroots team – whether you chipped in, volunteered, spread the word, or entrusted me with your vote, your support made my re-election possible.

**I am thankful** to live in a nation where even when our most basic rights are under threat, we come together and advocate for leaders who will make a difference.

**I am thankful** for the young people and women who came out to vote in record numbers this year, and didn’t let us settle for the way things have been done.

**And I am thankful** for the love and support of my family and friends, without whom I would not be able to do this work that means so much to me.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving!

Always grateful for this team,
Sara
---

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55030992/380459145/-2130083693?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGJjNjhkOC0wODZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnzN3Q6F5l8hc8jBbto8i8HGbGE763oBcvZAbmayn54=)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950622:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950623:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950624:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950625:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950626:6hxXBCGNc:m:1:3372944669:2D6EF011D7C38053F6E800CEAE4CAB74:r)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948633:JTHqBCGNy:m:1:3369487795:AF806C7E2D423CC0F665D88B27F2DB4F:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948633:JTHqBCGNy:m:1:3369487795:AF806C7E2D423CC0F665D88B27F2DB4F:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948633:JTHqBCGNy:m:1:3369487795:AF806C7E2D423CC0F665D88B27F2DB4F:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948633:JTHqBCGNy:m:1:3369487795:AF806C7E2D423CC0F665D88B27F2DB4F:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948633:JTHqBCGNy:m:1:3369487795:AF806C7E2D423CC0F665D88B27F2DB4F:r) **

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Everyone needs to focus on Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950479:JNNTZCGN4:m:1:3359512271:75A0D32681F747B6B800D388FFA7817F:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950479:JNNTZCGN4:m:1:3359512271:75A0D32681F747B6B800D388FFA7817F:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950479:JNNTZCGN4:m:1:3359512271:75A0D32681F747B6B800D388FFA7817F:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950479:JNNTZCGN4:m:1:3359512271:75A0D32681F747B6B800D388FFA7817F:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950479:JNNTZCGN4:m:1:3359512271:75A0D32681F747B6B800D388FFA7817F:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Give thanks in all circumstances
body:
| | | _“Rejoice always, pray without ceasing, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.”_**1 Thess. 5: 16-18 ESV**
---
|
---
---
I’m writing to personally thank you for everything you have done to save the United States of America, and to wish you a most blessed Thanksgiving! I know it isn’t easy and we don’t win every battle, but you are always there and you never give up. I am not alone in my gratitude for you and your steadfast commitment to our values, Constitution, and country. It is my sincere hope that you are able to relax and rejoice with family and friends this Thanksgiving, and to cast aside any worries you may have right now. No matter how any election goes, or what happens in politics, we have a gracious God who has called us to be thankful in _all_ circumstances – that means _all_ – and what a gift that is! You and I needn’t be weary or anxious. We can rest in this gift, even as we do the difficult and sometimes disappointing work that it takes to restore our beloved nation. Once again, Happy Thanksgiving, and please also [**enjoy a special Thanksgiving message**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**** for our most dedicated supporters like you!
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-2QfGopoqOlDyX6k9QUA)
---
Thankful for you, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._u80VN5lg8GInuzzKFzQ)
---

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Happy Thanksgiving on behalf of myself and my entire team!
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K8xLmvc6AuGlbublcfvHgRs0gEMHbTG9TVRZB7D0zHMl8jN1EIAV-8A2iVMTlP_Qo2DO0wzE-yp2g5AGCo9ECivKtOB4HoolualTPS4w2Yj4keDvHDKXoXcOjEkqpE-rqEOVrfk1THyist1-WZUkN2gV7TfEm5dI&c=JhSAGbf0JigjAPhcVt3ls3diP_reKxcVYXzdgZlw6eVIPU5_qMMcLw==&ch=wqjx_Zy5TWwu2xs9WXxn_y1XHGN77wTAt2gTyqdGHCOmveBZr-oU-g==)
---
| Friend
Happy Thanksgiving on behalf of myself and my entire team! While you spend time with the family and friends you hold close, I hope you're able to reflect on all the things you're thankful for.
Too often, we fail to consider all the good in our lives. We are all blessed to call America home, and while you give thanks, I hope you will reflect on what being an American means to you.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K8xLmvc6AuGlbublcfvHgRs0gEMHbTG9TVRZB7D0zHMl8jN1EIAV-8A2iVMTlP_Qo2DO0wzE-yp2g5AGCo9ECivKtOB4HoolualTPS4w2Yj4keDvHDKXoXcOjEkqpE-rqEOVrfk1THyist1-WZUkN2gV7TfEm5dI&c=JhSAGbf0JigjAPhcVt3ls3diP_reKxcVYXzdgZlw6eVIPU5_qMMcLw==&ch=wqjx_Zy5TWwu2xs9WXxn_y1XHGN77wTAt2gTyqdGHCOmveBZr-oU-g==)
---
| Thanksgiving is a time for family, and while millions of American families gather to give thanks for the blessings in their lives, I wanted to personally wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving.
Have a happy Thanksgiving,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K8xLmvc6AuGlbublcfvHgRs0gEMHbTG9TVRZB7D0zHMl8jN1EIAV-8A2iVMTlP_Qo2DO0wzE-yp2g5AGCo9ECivKtOB4HoolualTPS4w2Yj4keDvHDKXoXcOjEkqpE-rqEOVrfk1THyist1-WZUkN2gV7TfEm5dI&c=JhSAGbf0JigjAPhcVt3ls3diP_reKxcVYXzdgZlw6eVIPU5_qMMcLw==&ch=wqjx_Zy5TWwu2xs9WXxn_y1XHGN77wTAt2gTyqdGHCOmveBZr-oU-g==)

| Kat Cammack

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952271:6YDyZCGNp:m:1:3345639852:225AF2B936645223593845377C95EB7D:r)
---

Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

| | Dear Patriot, During this time of Thanksgiving, the team at PragerU wants freedom-loving Americans to know how grateful we are for YOU. This year, PragerU promised America’s families that we’d deliver patriotic resources to inoculate our children from the left’s lies--and, thanks to our donors, we’re delivering on that promise. Generous tax-deductible donations are the reason PragerU can continue reaching millions of young people with our shared values.
---
[**Help us reach millions more young people**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84585%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wjRR4sOgvSQLDBKvHgSmag&sysid=1)
---
The left is working overtime to influence young minds from kindergarten to post-grad. PragerU is providing the antidote that millions are turning to for help. With the addition of PragerU Kids, PragerU is now producing entertaining, pro-American content for every age--teaching youth to be grateful for our country’s history, traditions, and founding principles. Parents and young people from all over the country write to us. They tell us how thankful they are for our wholesome, truthful, commonsense content. This gratitude fuels our spirits and energizes the PragerU staff every day.
---
We realize the fight ahead is daunting. Knowing you stand with us makes all the difference. [If you haven’t yet given to PragerU this year, please give today. Your tax-deductible support will allow PragerU to double down on everything you care about.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84586%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WDLltjpKAVUYQzGnj0cPkg&sysid=1) If you have already given, thank you, and please consider forwarding this email to your friends and family. Only banded together can we save America. From the PragerU family to yours, thank you, and have a blessed Thanksgiving with your loved ones. Gratefully, Your PragerU Team

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqvqko2mr68do5lindqge8qlm3e9om4176ppkk08_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6co74cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdl5bpguudhtlioq3nl2h3nokplbr2187line2b0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6co74cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ibccnvldorjuivsi1ssvrreqf2sgloq4bdiap8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6co74cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfl5ajg7c5rtbedtaap06gn9mcuus4acvkssq86g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6co74cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8vk3j3p3rk15f15367ia6i5r0oen354qm9mtt8g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6co74cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays for a few reasons. First, it allows us the opportunity to be thankful for the things in life that mean the most to us. For me, this is a healthy family, my kids, good friendships, and you – my supporters. This past year, you helped my campaign reach unimaginable heights and hit every goal we’ve set. We could not have defended NV-03 without your support. The second reason why I love Thanksgiving is...the stuffing. You probably didn’t know this about me, but it’s one of my favorite parts of the meal _and I can make it pretty good myself._ I won’t keep you any longer because I don’t want your turkey to dry out! Enjoy your Thanksgiving and the time you’ll spend with those who are close to you. Warmly, Susie Lee

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
🦃 All the best to you & your family on this special holiday.
| | |
---
Peter, Good morning! I’m writing to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving today. I’ve been thinking this morning about the things I am most thankful for. It’s a long list. Of course, I am incredibly thankful for the things that matter most; the blessings my family enjoys, God’s grace, and this amazing American experiment. I am thankful for all those who’ve bravely served to secure and defend our freedom, and those who put their lives on the line every day to keep our communities safe. Today, we must remember those who are far away from their loved ones and the comfort of home this holiday season. And I'm thankful for YOU, Peter. Together, we’re keeping up the fight for a stronger Alabama and a stronger America. _Together, we will lead the charge for our conservative values and a better tomorrow!_ Enjoy some turkey and football today, and all the best to you and your loved ones. \- Coach
---

body:
Happy Thanksgiving from The Ohio Democratic Party
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55034562/380474233/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U1MmMxOC0xMTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHrQRRW-h1Zasx3OA7vbZGxQ8yKW9cIYl3ryyuiMyzA=) | Hey there,

We don’t want to take too much of your time. We just want to let you know how grateful our team is for your support.

Thank you to everyone who contributed, volunteered, voted, and fought for Ohio Democrats. If not for you, we wouldn’t be sending Rep. Marcy Kaptur or Representative-elects Emilia Sykes and Greg Landsman to Washington to stand up for the people of Ohio.

Thanks to your support, Ohio made the congressional “red wave” that so many predicted look more like a ripple. That’s a big deal.

We have work to do to take our state back. And we’re not done fighting. But today, we hope you have a Happy Thanksgiving with loved ones.

Thank you,

The Ohio Democratic Party ** **

name: Chrissy
subject: a very special thanks to you this Thanksgiving
body:
Derek, Happy Thanksgiving!
| | |
---
Derek, Happy Thanksgiving!

I have much to be thankful for – from my amazing family and friends to having the opportunity to continue serving our community in PA-06. **_For the latter, I deeply thank YOU._**

Thank you for the enormous trust you've placed in me as we work together to build a better future for all individuals and families here in PA-06 and across the country. I certainly look forward to talking to you soon and bringing you updates on our progress.
So as you find moments of comfort with your loved ones this Thanksgiving, I hope you consider joining me in bringing a small dose of hope to those whose lives have been disrupted by emergencies or crises – big or small – this past year. Here are a few ways to get involved this Thanksgiving:
If you have time, the Chester County Food Bank and Helping Harvest in Berks County are always accepting volunteers to help pack food boxes. It's a simple activity, but one that truly makes a difference. If you have just a little bit of time on your hands, please consider volunteering with the [**Chester County Food Bank**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55034565/380474240/-1740003681?refcode=jtk775-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWU1MmMxOC0xMTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqxqJfRgy_vX1kWokE_p3JeSnc9UZWBfdNG59AA4ju4=&emci=b1cef6af-ec69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6ae52c18-116c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21278485) or **[Helping Harvest in Berks County](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55034566/380474241/1399964338?refcode=jtk775-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWU1MmMxOC0xMTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqxqJfRgy_vX1kWokE_p3JeSnc9UZWBfdNG59AA4ju4=&emci=b1cef6af-ec69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6ae52c18-116c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21278485)**.
And finally, if you or someone you know needs food right now, click [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55034567/380474242/-1755451740?refcode=jtk775-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWU1MmMxOC0xMTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqxqJfRgy_vX1kWokE_p3JeSnc9UZWBfdNG59AA4ju4=&emci=b1cef6af-ec69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6ae52c18-116c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21278485) to find your local food bank and get access to resources right in your neighborhood.
Thank you for your compassion and support. Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and happy Thanksgiving.
There's work to be done,

Chrissy
P.S. Here's a photo of my daughter and me volunteering at the Chester County Food Bank!
