name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r)
---
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948653:Jv6C_CGNq:m:1:3370555685:BA83E8250F4DBC5545ED58C00A8218B5:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Folks need to know about December 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950636:6bSY_CGBN:m:1:3372576248:6E9D53AD1E2B3C2C94CDC22002DB4300:r)

clean_body: | Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to pay for them. Please let me explain: It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters. In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race. But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th. Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election. Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - our Senate race. That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date. We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HmesSetrucVdem587eBRJSoY8oVoCqd04TcjpS55AhM=/Hy8labT86Cafkff8xRfaYrfNdzYhwwYJG5SFqs3fHNA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221124-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of this holiday season.

From the moment we began this campaign, I've been struck by the graciousness of people like you - people who supported me in a tough race and who believe in my work on behalf of our community. Your unwavering support led to yet another victory this year, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to continue representing Virginia's 7th District in Congress.

Today, I'll be celebrating with family and reflecting on all that I am thankful for.

With you in my corner, Peter, we've been able to accomplish so much for our district and the Commonwealth. Looking ahead, I'll continue doing what I've always done - working tirelessly for the needs of our community.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.

Grateful, as always,
Abigail
---

name: David Trone
subject: Thanksgiving Greetings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,
From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving!
www.davidtrone.com [www.davidtrone.com]
This Thanksgiving, I’m especially thankful for all of you — my constituents and supporters — for the trust you’ve placed in me to continue serving you in Washington. As I reflect on the last few years, I’m inspired by the strength of our community, and those of you who devoted your time and efforts to helping those in need.
I couldn’t be more optimistic for the months and years ahead. I know that the future is bright, and that we’ll continue to achieve so much together. Best wishes for a happy, safe, and healthy Thanksgiving!
With gratitude,
David
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpmlerp7pnhkbofe7kkmq9r5k3shjhc55rkenhm8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhvva5q1l8h1ga6721oa3267a0go4cnb2ud1d438_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor4cdh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, friend! 🍁🦃
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Happy Thanksgiving, friend!

I'm so grateful to have this time to come together with family and friends. It's been a long year of fighting for El Paso's future, and it's important to take some time to rest and recharge for the work still ahead.

And you better believe I'll be making my famous apple pie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_apple_pie?refcode=221124_ve_thanksgiving_l1] ! ☺️

secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_apple_pie?refcode=221124_ve_thanksgiving_i1 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_apple_pie?refcode=221124_ve_thanksgiving_i1]

Friend, moments like these are the reason I go to work everyday. I'm fighting for a better future for my family and for yours. One where every family in El Paso can put good food on the table and find time to relax with their loved ones.

I'm so grateful to have you with me in that fight, friend. I hope you and your loved ones have a safe, warm, and joyful Thanksgiving.

— Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Giving thanks
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=112422 [secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=112422]
Friend,
As I get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving with my family, I am reflecting on this past year and all that I have to be grateful for. You are a big part of that, friend.
I am thankful for all you've done to support our House DFL team. Because of the work of Minnesotans like you we are going into the next year poised to make our state a better place.
While there is lots to be thankful for, I also acknowledge the pain and trauma of this holiday for Indigenous Minnesotans and recognize our responsibility to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
Thank you,
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: December 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950617:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950618:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950619:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950620:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950621:603DxCGSN:m:1:3331703221:89508E5C318EB8DEEB34C13EDE4E4BC5:r)

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Wishing you a Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I couldn’t be more grateful for your support this past year, and I am so thankful for everyone who was a part of this campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55036124/380481327/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWYwZWEzZi0xNjZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5qekIQrwHHh7PrbODPUpVB7tyAV7QeBNu8liBgIL9I=)
**Peter, from my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving!**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55036125/380481328/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWYwZWEzZi0xNjZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5qekIQrwHHh7PrbODPUpVB7tyAV7QeBNu8liBgIL9I=)**
I couldn’t be more grateful for your support this past year, and I am so thankful for everyone who was a part of this campaign. Because of every person who contributed their money and their time, and everyone who showed up to make their voice heard at the polls, **we were able to deliver a resounding victory for Northeast Ohio.**

Peter, I’m looking forward to what this next year brings us. And I hope that you have the opportunity to enjoy the holiday and relax with your loved ones.

From the bottom of my heart: Thank you. Happy Thanksgiving!

Emilia
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.**

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: A Happy Thanksgiving to you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi Peter, I wanted to take a quick moment away from all of the craziness of the past month to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving! There is so much to be thankful for this year, especially after the election season we just endured. This past year has given us all kinds of challenges, but we made it through, and now it’s time to celebrate with our closest friends and family as the holiday season commences. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55036173/380481596/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWI0OWU1Zi0xNjZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZUavb6-6uiHeQai8tYZqur1B-upash8e-5vD9-djKA=&emci=482d9a37-936a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=0eb49e5f-166c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=28008880) Hi Peter, I wanted to take a quick moment away from all of the craziness of the past month to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving! There is so much to be thankful for this year, especially after the election season we just endured. This past year has given us all kinds of challenges, but we made it through, and now it’s time to celebrate with our closest friends and family as the holiday season commences. I hope you’re able to enjoy some good food and family time today as we all try to shift into a more relaxed end to the year. Happy Thanksgiving!! name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjfkrqur3cqd0u1n17ja3nriv3446jifvrhuprr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdc75mppj4ppnmcrj5cjgesp7corj68q65cdge4p66ttm66qrecth6soe8p5iesrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9omcs3n6di3fcjjcoor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm9pj0clhmcpb24no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8uo853tqlas9j2mvhlhrk8rv98rphq8fhf0gh0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4m0eu952phn1as63g51hbhta9vvu5jd3c4fgai8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor6clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0t91kndo7j76r0qoha3oan6mdk3pv707v004dl0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor6clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: American Action News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qubd0a06okkc1g13amn3nv4cjdb1v24p4anei0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc6ii8b719cickg4pbll69mcb8up8ca1q6f1ba5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg6aor6clh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to raise $30,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950646:JoepFCGN_:m:1:3371812801:3CA6235D84050B8574A03A7759DFE1F9:r)

clean_body: | Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to pay for them. Please let me explain: It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters. In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race. But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th. Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election. Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - our Senate race. That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date. We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948662:63yrFCGN7:m:1:3371220873:00BD01EB9FA045C59A997687E21894BC:r)
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Peter, this is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955815:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955816:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955817:6vUVFCGN_:m:1:3331421248:15B4F204B50308D25D9E5D0ADB413E5B:r)
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We have two tasks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950494:JSMiFCGJN:m:1:3361486117:3AAA0EE2593CB73F243032C90A6DDFF3:r)

name: American Update
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0174%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=n6ytJgM26qpSbdd0DPUp7w&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41772%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wUY3zRybBIOprs4%2bFbbobw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41773%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jMAbum%2fWOD13hky9Mb%2fJUQ&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0174%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=n6ytJgM26qpSbdd0DPUp7w&sysid=1)_

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
Happy Thanksgiving to each of you from Team Aird. As we reflect on all we have this Thanksgiving, let us also remember the struggles and sacrifices of our ancestors. Let us reflect on the National Day of Mourning observed by Indigenous Americans to remember and honor those lost to genocide.
Let us be thankful for what we have, continue our work for justice for all, and form that more perfect Union our founding documents call us to strive towards.
My deepest thanks and gratitude to each of you for your kindness, trust, and partnership. May this holiday be a moment of peace, reflection, and revival for each of you and your loved ones.
Sincerely,
Lashrecse

name: Kevin Hern for Congress
subject: 🦃 Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
From my family to yours, we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a6d170b2c2754e4f/2d806c0239786b32c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter,

Before the day gets away from me, I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving!

This holiday is always a great time to gather with family, watch football, and enjoy a traditional Thanksgiving feast.

**But what I love most about Thanksgiving is the chance it gives us to take a break from our hectic day-to-day lives and reflect on ALL that we have to be thankful for!**
---
---
I couldn’t be more grateful for my family, friends, our nation – the greatest in the history of the world – and the opportunity I have to serve my fellow Oklahomans.
I’m thankful for you, too, and all the support you’ve given me and my family in 2022.

Hope you and your loved ones have a wonderful Thanksgiving Day! Sincerely, Kevin Hern
---
id:2022-11-16-14:39:14:254t
---

Thanksgiving is a time to express gratitude and appreciation—and our family couldn't let this holiday pass by without expressing our sincere gratitude for your support and commitment to California and our campaign.

Thank you.

We appreciate you standing with us.

Happy Thanksgiving,
-Brian, Megan, & family

name: =?utf-8?Q?UAP?=
subject: Why are some of our nation’s Heroes behind bars for Thanksgiving?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
How you can help our Heroes get home for the holidays | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c26540904b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, It's Thanksgiving, so we wanted to start by saying how grateful we are for your support. Every one of our dedicated Patriots is vital to our mission, and we can't thank you enough! **But as you sit around the table today to enjoy family and food, we can’t forget that some of our Warriors will be spending Thanksgiving behind bars.**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=103309e672&e=fdefed58de)
---
These men and women are separated from their families and living in a condition no Hero should ever have to see. **They need our help.** _Can you chip in a few dollars to show your gratitude to these Warriors and help get them home to their families? Contribute at this secure link:**[https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-5589178/](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=193f50d324&e=fdefed58de)**_ Thanks for your support this holiday season, Nick Coffman United American Patriots

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950661:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950662:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950663:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950664:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950665:6ea5eCGNq:m:1:3371220873:2D35A4EFB1BACA8834D28ED1F8FA1CAF:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Update in AZ
body:
ALWAYS!

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954304:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)
---
Peter,

Our team is fighting hard to ensure every LEGAL vote is counted - but we cannot do it alone.

This is where you come in, Peter, this is the final push, and I can't do this without you.

[**Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954305:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

**I 'm asking for your immediate help.**

[**With one contribution of $5, $10, or $35, I can reach every corner of the state and make sure that Republicans know that their ballot may NOT have been counted.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954305:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

| [**RUSH $35** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954305:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

[**RUSH $100** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954306:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

[**RUSH $250** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954307:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

[**RUSH $500** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954308:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

Together, we can do this.

Thank You,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61954304:JhrOeCGN5:m:1:3372944669:E94AEAC396DFCE37A3A17FC9CB30A12D:r)

Kari Lake

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011rIh6i-673EnTAcgkLPvicDvwabe9FyqkR8qS7q7RhmgmM9-h969-lqfgfGP8nglNOtl9lJpsAnVtHzGtqBfXGAARpPvg8OqYg9GYa0QuU_na2hIsaZ4KPx1_RuSwrn4zsFj82z22h4=&c=QwfxAETL91EMUuyHGFStxTmAJrvM4RhssObZuTImMsNLPDrCL_qh4A==&ch=DcK0Cx53gKrSUMrdNC-aioxjAKOh2az9X1UjoJje_9vaHf2EgdttKQ==)
---
| Peter,
---
| On behalf of the entire Gaetz family, we would like to wish you and yours a very Happy Thanksgiving!
This Florida Man sure has a lot to be thankful for today, Peter, and one of them is without a doubt patriots like YOU, who have supported me throughout a tumultuous election year and given me the honor of putting America First once again in the Swamp for another term in Congress.
In addition, we ALL should be thankful to live in the greatest nation that has ever existed - one that has better leadership waiting in the wings!
Enjoy the holiday, and God Bless the United States of America!
---
|
---
| I hope you get to spend the day watching some football, enjoying some great cooking, and spending time with loved ones.

Happy Thanksgiving,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz
---
---
| |
---
|

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952060:6jOySCGNK:m:1:3253819041:BCCA9C5A3B0604E41583C3606CAC0C81:r)

name: American Defense News
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. Th
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs416t0p19m10sr61ut99b58es1d3onefsencai0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi64o72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu94o6pn1os6s2bqb3u6j9e1km76fkg9ib47pcoo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi64o72chh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1urj28i8r78ak65062cr074vph5cnth1fasp2m0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi64o72chh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ijfjavg9io23osgtpkm016obgc9q510chbn4eg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi64o72chh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr86a9evulge5rghtkrm532erppm1bn8goqfajbg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp77dr7m8pn9olhemob5crnckqmas36cior8s3j66qn4sbje1j33dr36pg7adtnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664qbadhgepgmcd30mdgefc5lclp2bs)
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9gib16iu76dbcfet1n8tudjbas9oitnk3vjanro_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkccbunmsfmb1ho78nn2vnac2nsek1ltmubhq5n0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0gemjhlb7afilf056rkg14hbdguc4ksm7p6eeu0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0n2hbb3vie9vtlq88kg3idtgnu6ofqq7nu14fn8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfrmtnlk9lp8dtl856nmnp7pje5eo9c3fnf3u4p8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spi68o32chh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jake Evans
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.trailblazerising.org/so/f4OIcTUwy/c?w=b5WwcA86BzRQLcP7Da0C41FRcOJ-Gt8wKJWyQHDKv9Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJhaWxibGF6ZXJpc2luZy5vcmcvc28vZjRPSWNUVXd5P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYTEzMDFhZGQtYmU4ZC00YmJhLWExY2UtMTZjZDBhZjYyNjFmIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends, Baylie and I wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving. Our country has been through a lot this year. And you and your family probably have too. Thanksgiving is a time to step back and reflect on life and all that we should be grateful for. Please enjoy your special meal with family and friends, and remind those that mean the most to you that they are special and you are thankful for them. I also want to give a special thank you to our first responders, veterans, and law enforcement officers who keep us safe day in and day out. I hope you have a safe and memorable Thanksgiving surrounded by family and friends. Be blessed, Jake Evans
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0b2mr3oggqsvj6p467iaqstdbl299913nievvvo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg69oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl696glpcscu5pp617gmdc2pvus7atgiknlbko5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg69oj2c3h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbb7666k9ia0gi7cq4gf7g7ejbbb4dlprdded6kg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spg69oj2c3h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.
