name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951304:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951305:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951306:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951307:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951308:6IOwqCGON:m:1:3317145305:519F6EF244272D5DD12A6D7788FFD917:r)

| | Dear Patriot, During this time of Thanksgiving, the team at PragerU wants freedom-loving Americans to know how grateful we are for YOU. This year, PragerU promised America’s families that we’d deliver patriotic resources to inoculate our children from the left’s lies—and, thanks to our donors, we’re delivering on that promise. Generous tax-deductible donations are the reason PragerU can continue reaching millions of young people with our shared values.
---

---
The left is working overtime to influence young minds from kindergarten to post-grad. PragerU is providing the antidote that millions are turning to for help. With the addition of PragerU Kids, PragerU is now producing entertaining, pro-American content for every age—teaching youth to be grateful for our country’s history, traditions, and founding principles. Parents and young people from all over the country write to us. They tell us how thankful they are for our wholesome, truthful, commonsense content. This gratitude fuels our spirits and energizes the PragerU staff every day.
---
We realize the fight ahead is daunting. Knowing you stand with us makes all the difference. [If you haven’t yet given to PragerU this year, please give today. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | It's been a long year.

We’ve faced an economic crisis, attacks on our rights, some tough elections, and so much more. It would be easy to write this year off, to say that we shouldn’t look back. But all of these challenges have demonstrated what we should be thankful for.

**I’m thankful for progress.** This year we passed historic legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act, ensuring that this country is ready to lower prescription drug prices, boost domestic manufacturing, tackle the climate crisis, cut the deficit, and so much more.

**I’m thankful for you.** Without grassroots supporters like you, we wouldn’t be able to fight for issues like abortion rights. I’m grateful for the chance to keep on fighting for you and tackling the big problems we face as a nation.

**And most of all, I’m thankful for my family.** As we begin to see more people again, I am incredibly grateful to be surrounded by so many of my loved ones this Thanksgiving.

I wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving. May your celebration be safe, healthy, and fulfilling.

Yours,

Josh Gottheimer

---
|
---

name: Andy Beshear
subject: From the Beshear family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Take time to give thanks today. Happpy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I have so much to be grateful for this Thanksgiving: my wife, Britainy, our children, Will and Lila, and of course, Winnie, our favorite four-legged companion. And I’m so grateful for the opportunity to serve as your Governor.

Last, but certainly not least, I’m thankful for all of you. Because of your continued support, we’re building a stronger Commonwealth and creating a better future for all Kentuckians. None of this would be possible without you.

However you are spending your holiday, I hope you find time to count your blessings and give thanks.

Wishing you a happy, safe, and meaningful Thanksgiving from my family to yours.

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

Andy Beshear for Governor

Louisville, KY 40204
United States

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: We're thankful for YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
|
---
Friend,

This Thanksgiving, we’re thankful for _your_ support. Your participation in the Republican Accountability Project’s work has been instrumental in strengthening democracy. We have been so successful in defending America’s founding values because of you and our entire coalition of Republicans, former Republicans, conservatives, independents, and Democrats. Every time you send us your stories and share our work with friends, family and colleagues, you’re working to strengthen the institutions that made this country such a success. Everything you do adds up, and we so appreciate it. So thank you. This year has presented unique challenges, and we thank you for standing up for what’s right. Without you, we would not be able to hold the Republican Party accountable. Have a happy Thanksgiving, and thank you for keeping us in this fight. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project

Hello,
From our family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving. We have so much to be thankful for.
We’re celebrating by spending time with one another and with our extended family – and we’re grateful for every minute.
We’re also grateful for you and everything you’ve done for the Granite State. We want you to know that you are very much in our thoughts too.
We hope that you have a warm and safe day filled with traditions old and new, and that you hold space for those who can’t be with loved ones today.
Happy Thanksgiving!
With every good wish,
The Hassan Family

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950688:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950689:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950690:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950691:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950692:Jy6D4CG3N:m:1:3370555685:52EEB13BA1182431188C2C41CA8AC3E6:r)

body:
We can hardly believe this:

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: This year, I'm thankful for so many things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I want to say thank you
Peter,

Thanksgiving is a day to spend time with family, eat, relax, sit in a food coma, and watch a little football.

**But most importantly, it 's a day to give thanks.**

In the Kilmer family, before digging into the turkey, we go around the table and say what we're thankful for. This year, I'm thankful for so many things.

I'm thankful for the brave men and women who have kept (and continue to keep) our country safe. I'm thankful for the amazing region in which we live - including for the Olympic National Park and for Puget Sound. I'm thankful for the teachers and educational employees that educate my kids. **I 'm thankful for the hundreds of thousands of Americans who made their voices heard to ensure our government's policies are as good and as righteous as the people of the United States. **

I will always be thankful for folks in our region for affording me the honor of representing you. It's the honor of a lifetime to serve you and the country we love for another two years.

While it's clear there is more work to be done and that the path ahead will not always be easy to navigate, I remain eager to get back to work and optimistic about our nation's future.

But for now, I want to say thank you, and from my family to yours: _Happy Thanksgiving!_
---

With gratitude,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fuF3SHKx2k_acLWlUmF8fgQvl766EqkuNlASFoFvbkU=/gQ3uP3NxksYLAIejYjSmfvhZvMjZqyb7WwhtEIiJixw=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fuF3SHKx2k_acLWlUmF8fgQvl766EqkuNlASFoFvbkU=/eZiuXWymOdOMAXF-HymkB295HZMDI2i-_WU-_JcMjH8=)

subject: from my family to yours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re a vital part of my extended family. I couldn’t ask for a better grassroots team. You’ve played a major role in helping us defy all odds and win big in the midterm elections, and I couldn’t be more grateful.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55040597/380498023/-367444636?hl=en&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20221124_EN_1.1_0_1MO_thanksgiving_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTIyNTk3Mi0yZTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ui8acdLJar9TZIqzQDExBwM2BW-A2h5u6zkIu7H8v4A=&emci=df51d722-3d6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9a225972-2e6c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=5260669)
One of my family’s favorite traditions is to cook Thanksgiving dinner so I thought I’d pass along a delicious recipe that we love.

I hope you have a wonderful time safely celebrating the holiday with loved ones.

Thanks,
Debbie

P.S. If you’d like to see more recipes, please follow me on Instagram: **[@cleancookingcongresswoman.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55040598/380498024/-367444636?hl=en&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20221124_EN_1.1_0_1MO_thanksgiving_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTIyNTk3Mi0yZTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ui8acdLJar9TZIqzQDExBwM2BW-A2h5u6zkIu7H8v4A=&emci=df51d722-3d6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9a225972-2e6c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=5260669)**
* * *
**Roasted Butternut Squash Salad with Creamy Tahini Dressing (Cook’s Country recipe)**
_Serves 6_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55040599/380498025/-367444636?hl=en&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20221124_EN_1.1_0_1MO_thanksgiving_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTIyNTk3Mi0yZTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ui8acdLJar9TZIqzQDExBwM2BW-A2h5u6zkIu7H8v4A=&emci=df51d722-3d6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9a225972-2e6c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=5260669)
_INGREDIENTS_
Roasted Squash:
* 2- to 21⁄4-pound butternut squash, peeled, seeded, and cut into 1-inch pieces (about 7 cups)
* 1 red onion, halved and sliced through root end, 1⁄2 inch thick
* 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil
* 2 teaspoons ground cumin
* 11⁄4 teaspoons table salt
* 1⁄2 teaspoon pepper

Dressing and Salad:
* 1⁄4 cup tahini
* 1⁄4 cup water
* 2 tablespoons mayonnaise
* 2 tablespoons lemon juice
* 1 garlic clove, minced
* 1⁄2 teaspoon table salt
* 1⁄4 teaspoon pepper
* 5 cups baby arugula
* 3⁄4 cup pecans, toasted and chopped
* 1/3 cup pitted kalamata olives, chopped
* 1⁄4 cup chopped fresh mint

_DIRECTIONS_
1. For the roasted squash: Adjust oven rack to middle position and heat oven to 425 degrees. Toss the roasted squash ingredients together in a bowl. Spread vegetables in a single layer on rimmed baking sheet. Roast until squash and onion are browned and tender, 35 to 45 minutes, stirring halfway through roasting. Remove sheet from oven and let cool for 15 minutes.

2. For the dressing and salad: Meanwhile, whisk tahini, water, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, salt and pepper in the now-empty bowl until creamy and thoroughly combined, about 30 seconds. Reserve 1⁄4 cup dressing.

3. Add arugula to remaining dressing in bowl and toss to combine. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Spread arugula on large serving platter. Top with squash and onion, pecans, olives and mint. Drizzle salad with reserved dressing. Serve.

---
|
---

GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878.

Top with squash and onion, pecans, olives and mint. Drizzle salad with reserved dressing. Serve. | PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC 315 INSPIRATION LANE GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: You “can’t be trusted.”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952105:JPYV5CGBN:m:1:3317145305:338A3C1C817850F74624B14BBFA286C9:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952105:JPYV5CGBN:m:1:3317145305:338A3C1C817850F74624B14BBFA286C9:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952105:JPYV5CGBN:m:1:3317145305:338A3C1C817850F74624B14BBFA286C9:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952105:JPYV5CGBN:m:1:3317145305:338A3C1C817850F74624B14BBFA286C9:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952105:JPYV5CGBN:m:1:3317145305:338A3C1C817850F74624B14BBFA286C9:r) **

subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e0cc8fe5122446e8af1a77cb9d4b8e2&_e=Bv5DSIQj3g55_ct9RuRkVTFfFVXBgtVJVNYikOOeckTTo2gpb8jgl82jmjr6DcHNh3DW8pNvU2I2opVUrlT3cAoAjNdbYY9xDFLnR9ScQ50L3l8Cg16wIn3D_QseIvnkybWYbHYRmyAnHJPUCQYQLpLhseuTPlheF_yGHf9AjuHX9qlnFD8kPvQiI2FVUKlJjrbvN_qe_7HJGCg5UBNFXniuso7Sdovuu7avQgVu2uo6tbgVmQXpZE2suIhdXXdRFnLs1YzGKIh0_0rSMBPWwnrX5uPLIAJoT4neIpUmCsM%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food – it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!

I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]()** Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . subject: Georgia or bust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950519:6M1lUCGNO:m:1:3370555685:67C6DDED39346F5676DF9CF1F7EFACDD:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950519:6M1lUCGNO:m:1:3370555685:67C6DDED39346F5676DF9CF1F7EFACDD:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950519:6M1lUCGNO:m:1:3370555685:67C6DDED39346F5676DF9CF1F7EFACDD:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950519:6M1lUCGNO:m:1:3370555685:67C6DDED39346F5676DF9CF1F7EFACDD:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950519:6M1lUCGNO:m:1:3370555685:67C6DDED39346F5676DF9CF1F7EFACDD:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r)
---
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948697:65u1UCGMN:m:1:3372944669:255F8EA1ED6B219491784FB767DFF813:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to raise $30,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950683:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950684:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950685:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950686:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950687:6qylUCGNP:m:1:3369487795:52A6A346D249F0AAF3806A5F1FC8E4E8:r)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Wishing everyone a safe and happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Friend,

As we reflect on everything we have to be thankful for this week, I wanted to reach out and express my gratitude for the support you have given me throughout this year’s election cycle. It was because of folks like you that we won a hard-fought victory on Election Day.

I know that many people are traveling, making last-minute grocery runs, and spending time with the most important people in their lives. But I am also thinking of those who are not able to spend the holidays with friends and family. As we reflect on everything we have to be thankful for, it is ever-important to consider ways to give back to our community so that others can share in the joys that we may have come to take for granted.

I am so thankful for everyone who has worked to demonstrate these values that make up our national fabric. The simple acts of kindness and generosity constantly remind me of what we’re working for: an economy that works for everyone and a political system that reflects the diversity that makes this country strong.

I know that whatever challenges we come across, we have never been more prepared to press forward and continue to make positive changes in people's lives, and for that, I am incredibly thankful.

Wishing you and yours a safe and happy Thanksgiving,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
On Thanksgiving, we take time to think about all we are grateful for and the many blessings we have received. And while we should do this every day, Thanksgiving Day gives us a little longer to reflect on and to share our gratitude with family and friends. And that is why I want to be sure that you know how grateful I am for you.

Lizzie Fletcher Thanksgiving [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-11-23%20at%202.45.20%20PM.png]

I am so thankful for family, friends, and supporters, near and far, who have made possible the opportunity to serve our community and our country in the Congress of the United States. And I am grateful to the people of Houston, who have entrusted me with the privilege of being their voice there. It is the privilege of a lifetime, and I am grateful to you for helping make it possible.
What we have accomplished together reminds us of all we can accomplish when we work together, when we appreciate all we have and work to ensure that these blessings reach everyone in our communities and across our country. The challenges we have faced remind us how important it is that we continue to do so.
It is with that in mind and deep gratitude in my heart that I wish you and your loved ones a wonderful day of Thanksgiving.
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress

Houston, TX 77098
United States

subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=636bd7b68f&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | |
---
| Happy Thanksgiving! On this Thanksgiving day, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a blessed holiday. I hope you are able to be surrounded by loved ones and those you hold close. With the tragic shooting in Chesapeake fresh in our minds, I ask each of you to remember the families in our community that may be missing someone around their table this year. There is so much to be thankful for in our great Commonwealth and awesome country. I know I am thankful for your support and for the opportunity to serve you in Congress starting in January! Wishing you all many blessings on this annual day of thanks! With gratitude, Jen
---

Hi friend, **🦃**** __****_HAPPY THANKSGIVING!_****🦃**
---
I wanted to reach out personally to wish you a happy Thanksgiving and thank you for your support. After a tough year and contentious election season, I'm most thankful for my loving family, our community that we call home in central Illinois, and the support of people like you. It's been an incredibly long year, but it's all been worth it because of the people who have helped take back their country. I wouldn’t be here without your support and generosity. Thank you,Darin LaHood
---

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: Derek, H​appy Thanksgiving from the Democratic Party.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Today and every day, I’m thankful for all the organizers, activists, and volunteers who dug deep and worked tirelessly in the midterm elections to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and ensure we can continue moving our country forward. | |
---
Derek, On Thanksgiving, we reflect on all we have to be grateful for -- _and this year, there’s much to celebrate._ Supporters like you all across the country rallied to canvass, make calls, and donate whatever they could to fight for every last vote. And we defied the odds -- together. Today and every day, I’m thankful for all the organizers, activists, and volunteers who dug deep and worked tirelessly in the midterm elections to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and ensure we can continue moving our country forward. I’m also thankful for the accomplishments of President Biden, Vice President Harris, and congressional Democrats who kept their promises to the American people and have delivered on historic legislation, like the _American Rescue Plan_ , the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, and the _Inflation Reduction Act_. And I’m grateful to live in a country where our democracy remains strong despite those who challenge it -- and to our troops serving to protect it. **I hope you take the time to rest and reflect today, and know that the Democratic Party and I wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving.** It’s an honor to be in this fight alongside you, Derek. Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee

clean_body: Today and every day, I’m thankful for all the organizers, activists, and volunteers who dug deep and worked tirelessly in the midterm elections to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and ensure we can continue moving our country forward. | | Derek, On Thanksgiving, we reflect on all we have to be grateful for -- and this year, there’s much to celebrate. Supporters like you all across the country rallied to canvass, make calls, and donate whatever they could to fight for every last vote. And we defied the odds -- together. Today and every day, I’m thankful for all the organizers, activists, and volunteers who dug deep and worked tirelessly in the midterm elections to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and ensure we can continue moving our country forward. I’m also thankful for the accomplishments of President Biden, Vice President Harris, and congressional Democrats who kept their promises to the American people and have delivered on historic legislation, like the American Rescue Plan , the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, and the Inflation Reduction Act. And I’m grateful to live in a country where our democracy remains strong despite those who challenge it -- and to our troops serving to protect it. I hope you take the time to rest and reflect today, and know that the Democratic Party and I wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving. It’s an honor to be in this fight alongside you, Derek. Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re out-of-this-world grateful.
#
Before we sit down to eat with August, Karl, and Gracie, we wanted to drop a quick note to say...**Happy Thanksgiving to yinz + yours, Derek. ❤️**
We’ve got so much to be grateful for this holiday season, and we can’t possibly fit it all into this email. But we’ll share three things at the top of our list.
First, the single biggest thing that our family is celebrating today is simply being safe, healthy, and whole. When John had his stroke, we were quickly reminded that we can’t take anything for granted. We’re so grateful for his recovery, and all the amazing medical professionals who took care of us back in May to make it possible.
Second, after two amazing but challenging years on the campaign trail, we’re grateful to be able to slow down as a family and enjoy the little things — like eating good food, playing with Levi + Artie, and just being together.
Third, Derek, we are out-of-this-world grateful for YOU. You + every single person who showed up at an event, chipped in, signed up to volunteer, or even just sent kind words of encouragement our way are the true power behind this people-powered effort that flipped Pennsylvania blue + ensured a Democratic Senate majority. We owe all of this to you — and for that we are so, so thankful. ❤️
That's all from us for today. **Wishing you a happy, healthy, + safe Thanksgiving — from the Fetterman family to yours. 🦃**
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49598?refcode=em20221124-8145&t=1&akid=8145%2E434096%2Es1FDU0)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221124-8145-footer&t=2&refcode2=8145_434096_s1FDU0&akid=8145%2E434096%2Es1FDU0)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=8145%2E434096%2Es1FDU0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8145%2E434096%2Es1FDU0)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951218:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951220:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951221:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951222:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61951224:JVi4OCGkN:m:1:3317145305:6EC8462A8EC7703ADD4887202A229F75:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Team NPP
subject: Thank you, Fellow Activist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
So much to be thankful for today.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55043454/380503875/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221124Thanksgiving_N_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2M2Q1Y2VlLTM3NmMtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-nJx8LlrKv1RX2gmn9lVrMm-kvPucAzuHbnAamKs8-U=)
| Fellow activist,

Today, we’d like to take a moment to thank each and every one of you.

This time last year, we told you our democracy was in grave peril, thanks in no small part to the extremists in Harrisburg who fought to enact racist voter suppression laws aimed at silencing us.

It’s thanks to you, and people like you across the nation, that our very democracy lived on to see another Thanksgiving. While the threat is by no means over, Americans stood up to anti-democratic extremists here and across the nation to defend our democracy.

Here in Pennsylvania, we didn’t just defend our democracy — **we flipped the state House, threw extremists out of power, and made massive progress toward a truly representative democracy.**

We couldn’t have done it without you, fellow activist. Every door we knocked, every voter we registered, and every vote we turned out are all thanks to your support.

And, we’re just getting started. We will continue to center Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work of voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. This is the foundation for achieving a more reflective democracy in Pennsylvania.

In solidarity and with gratitude,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55043455/380503876/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221124Thanksgiving_N_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_Signoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2M2Q1Y2VlLTM3NmMtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-nJx8LlrKv1RX2gmn9lVrMm-kvPucAzuHbnAamKs8-U=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. clean_body: So much to be thankful for today. = | Fellow activist, Today, we’d like to take a moment to thank each and every one of you. This time last year, we told you our democracy was in grave peril, thanks in no small part to the extremists in Harrisburg who fought to enact racist voter suppression laws aimed at silencing us. It’s thanks to you, and people like you across the nation, that our very democracy lived on to see another Thanksgiving. While the threat is by no means over, Americans stood up to anti-democratic extremists here and across the nation to defend our democracy. Here in Pennsylvania, we didn’t just defend our democracy — we flipped the state House, threw extremists out of power, and made massive progress toward a truly representative democracy. We couldn’t have done it without you, fellow activist. Every door we knocked, every voter we registered, and every vote we turned out are all thanks to your support. And, we’re just getting started. We will continue to center Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work of voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. This is the foundation for achieving a more reflective democracy in Pennsylvania. In solidarity and with gratitude, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

name: Katie Britt
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
>From my family to yours

Peter, Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family!

I’m thankful for the many blessings in my life as we enter into this holiday
season, and I’m taking much needed time to spend some extra quality time with
my family and friends.

What I am most thankful for this year is my loving and caring husband, and our
two amazing children. Throughout the campaign, Wesley, Bennett, and Ridgeway
were by my side through all the highs and lows, offering me words of
encouragement and cheering me on everyday.

I started my journey to the Senate wanting to make a difference for my
children, so they have their chance at the American Dream. Now, by the grace of
God and supporters like you, Peter, we will have a chance to preserve the
American Dream for children across our state and our nation.

For that, I am beyond blessed.

I pray for peace, blessings, and quality time for you and your loved ones this
holiday season.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Katie Britt

Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Dear friends, The Thanksgiving holiday is one of my favorite days of the year. We are blessed this year to have many members of the Grassley family gathering together around the table at the farm for our family feast. Barbara and I have so much to be thankful for, and we count our blessings for another year of continued good health and a bountiful harvest here in New Hartford. As we look to the year ahead, we count our supporters among our greatest blessings. I want you to know I'm working as hard as ever so that we may pass on our cherished blessings of freedom to our children and grandchildren. Barbara and I wish you and your family a blessed Thanksgiving holiday. Thank you for all you do,

Your Senator

P.S. Thanksgiving Day only comes around once a year. So, don't skip dessert. I'm saving room for an extra scoop of vanilla ice cream and a piece of Barbara's pecan pie. | Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.
---

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Happy Thanksgiving, friends!

I wanted to spread the spirit of gratitude and share some of the things I am most thankful for this Thanksgiving:

- Democratic voters (like you) around the country who helped lift our party to the best midterm election performance for an incumbent party in decades. Because we made our voices heard, we defied all odds to prevent the predicted “red wave” and defend our freedom and our democracy

- The passage of the Inflation Reduction Act in Congress earlier this year. The IRA provides the biggest investment in climate action in American history, raises taxes on the uber-wealthy, expands the Affordable Care Act, and will finally lower crucial drug costs for everyday people. It is a historic piece of legislation, and I am beyond proud to have voted for it.

- Of course, all of my family: my kids, Hank, Nelson, and Cricket, and my wife, Brittany. They are the center of my world, and I could not do any of this without them.

- My constituents in the 14th District of California. I am eternally grateful for the faith you’ve put in me and the privilege you’ve given me to continue representing you and advocating for progressive change in Congress.

I hope you enjoy your Thanksgiving too, friends.

— Eric

clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Happy Thanksgiving, friends! I wanted to spread the spirit of gratitude and share some of the things I am most thankful for this Thanksgiving: - Democratic voters (like you) around the country who helped lift our party to the best midterm election performance for an incumbent party in decades. Because we made our voices heard, we defied all odds to prevent the predicted “red wave” and defend our freedom and our democracy - The passage of the Inflation Reduction Act in Congress earlier this year. The IRA provides the biggest investment in climate action in American history, raises taxes on the uber-wealthy, expands the Affordable Care Act, and will finally lower crucial drug costs for everyday people. It is a historic piece of legislation, and I am beyond proud to have voted for it. - Of course, all of my family: my kids, Hank, Nelson, and Cricket, and my wife, Brittany. They are the center of my world, and I could not do any of this without them. - My constituents in the 14th District of California. I am eternally grateful for the faith you’ve put in me and the privilege you’ve given me to continue representing you and advocating for progressive change in Congress. I hope you enjoy your Thanksgiving too, friends. — Eric DONATE TO ERIC >> [] [] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950509:JVox0CGNw:m:1:3371220873:D7875194A65E459EDCD4CC82BE846B2B:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…” 😮
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952363:J0KU0CGhN:m:1:3369487795:637E5DCB05261A655211DEA1B7657557:r)

Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

As families across America gather together to cherish our Thanksgiving blessings and express our gratitude for one another, I write to say thank you.

Personally, I thank you for your tremendous support. Your prayers and warm wishes have been a source of strength and comfort to our family. We are all so grateful that our Pop continues to improve and make progress in his recovery.

Politically, I thank you for being part of our VIPs – our Volunteers In Politics — who make everything possible.

Thank you for your outside mobilization that helped courageous House Democrats pass transformative legislation to make progress in people’s lives — creating jobs, lowering health care costs, investing in climate action and helping veterans and military families access lifesaving cancer care.
Thank you for owning the ground and turning back the “red wave” to upend conventional wisdom and deliver a grassroots victory that saved our Democracy.

Thank you for ensuring strength in numbers in the next Congress, where we will continue to play a pivotal role in supporting Democrats’ visionary and transformative agenda.

Thank you for all you do. Happy Thanksgiving! >> https://twitter.com/TeamPelosi

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
---
From my family to yours, I want to take a moment to wish you a happy Thanksgiving.

We have so much to be thankful for this year, Peter.

Today, we get to celebrate with our loved ones in the greatest country on Earth.

I am so grateful for all your support this year, and I can’t wait to get to work in 2023.
---
In Service,
---
---
Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (FL-6)
