name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221124-3650-header&t=1&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)
We want to take this moment to give thanks to each of you.
Our movement is so grateful for your support, allyship, and all the work you do everyday to fight for a better world. We’re wishing warmth, gratitude, and happiness to you and yours, today and every day.
In honor of the holiday, we invite you to:
* Learn more about and pay homage to the original inhabitants of your hometown by using [**this map by Native Land Digital**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15229?t=2&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D).

* Support [**your local food bank**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15233?t=3&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D). Donating to and volunteering for local food banks is incredibly impactful – get involved this holiday season!

* Check in on a neighbor or your mutual aid pod (hey, maybe even offer them some pie!)

We also know **Thanksgiving and the holiday season can mean difficult conversations about politics with family or friends at the dinner table**. No matter what topics come up, use the Response Cycle ([**outlined here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15234?t=4&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)) as a framework for productive conversations! By centering _empathy and understanding,_ these discussions can actually win people over much more easily.
You can check out [**this useful tool**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15230?t=5&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D) developed by National Nurses United to practice having conversations about the need for Medicare for All!
Alexandria, and all of us at Team AOC, are so grateful that you are a part of this movement for a better world.
Happy Thanksgiving,
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20221124-3650-P_ENG_TYE_GFM&t=6&refcode2=3650_2526796_uQV2_D&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221124-3650-P_ENG_TYE_GFM&t=7&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3650%2E2526796%2EuQV2_D)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
Holding our Democratic Senate majority is a huge accomplishment! Will you please add your name to President Biden's thank you card?
| | | This Thanksgiving, now that we have OFFICIALLY held onto our Democratic Senate majority, we are SO thankful for President Joe Biden. His leadership helped us _make history_ and will let us **keep making progress for years to come.**

Political experts, historians, and journalists all predicted a “red wave” that would sweep Democrats out of the Senate, ushering in an _ultra_ -conservative agenda with catastrophic consequences for the country. **Instead, President Biden rallied the nation to his side and proved the doubters wrong.**

None of it would have been possible without President Biden, so we're asking Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign a MASSIVE thank you card for him -- but we don't see your signature in our records. **Would you please add your name right away?**

|
---
| |
### Statement on the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals Ruling, Vacating the Contempt Order against Catherine Engelbrecht and Gregg Phillips

The Fifth Circuit’s powerful ruling lays bare the excesses of Konnech, their attorneys, and the lower court.

The impermissible demands of Konnech, which were rubber-stamped by the district court, caused great harm to _True the Vote_ as an organization, as well as Catherine Engelbrecht and Gregg Phillips, who were imprisoned for over a week by Konnech and the court’s actions.

In addition, Engelbrecht and Phillips’ rights to openly speak on matters of public interest were impeded under the color of authority. But hear them clearly today; the investigation of Konnech and their activities continue across America.

Catherine and Gregg offer their profound gratitude for the Fifth Circuit’s vindication and are committed more strongly than ever to defending the integrity of American elections.
---
|
---
| | "Now is not the time to think of what you do not have. Think of what to do with what there is."

— Ernest Hemingway
---
|
---
| This Thanksgiving _True the Vote_ is profoundly grateful for the decision released yesterday by the Fifth Circuit.

Our hearts are full of gratitude for all of you who believed in us, prayed for us and stood by our side through this difficult time.
---
|
---
|
---

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Have a great Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friends,
I wanted to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving! This year has given us so much to be thankful for. Today, I give thanks for my loved ones, the beautiful State of Colorado, and for your support.
I hope that you have a wonderful holiday full of the people you love, warmth, and delicious food. Colorado has so much to offer this time of year, so whether you are hitting the slopes this weekend, driving through the mountains, or cozying up on the couch, I hope that you find time to reflect on all there is to be grateful for.
Your continued commitment to freedom and democracy throughout this year has left me humbled and honored. Thank you so much for everything you do, and have a great Thanksgiving!
– Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
I’m writing to you from overseas, where I’m on a congressional delegation trip.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15495%2E3422442%2EjMKsCI)
Derek,
Happy Thanksgiving! I’m writing to you from overseas, where I’m on a congressional delegation trip. “CODELs” as they’re called are a chance for Members of Congress to travel to other countries. The purpose of this trip is to honor our veterans and hear from active military members. I’m excited to spend my Thanksgiving serving dinner to service members who are stationed far from home.
I’m reflecting on all of the many things I have to be thankful for this year. I’m thankful for my family, especially my kids, who are awfully happy all of the campaign ads have stopped. And I’m so thankful for each and every Porter Supporter who helped us in so many different ways. As my former law professor Elizabeth Warren taught me, nobody gets elected alone.
I hope you enjoy a day filled with your Thanksgiving food of choice and good company.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Katie Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=2&akid=15495%2E3422442%2EjMKsCI)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=15495%2E3422442%2EjMKsCI).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=79280607636d45bdb4a14daae2d96f67&_e=5TU2C8PCVEh3oidvLqHrSrqbPzLhuXsWw3AjDavbLCy1BkxZ1t0DFpFMcS8W5NCyga6gIKmyBv7JtfZuNcWpXwZIaa2uC_tfE0BIcpN8ToFHfAZ4AsMm0jMRnn3hBNOd7oCngBGublsd-hxzbgG6q1TNy-WiWMxPr4J32TkmOQj8BM6AWrDU_IL3AdmNju8fc0Pcx0SOIXYfZak3R3UIdWkY9C7ZNi-iCxV7e5c3miZKx2vtbO4Qn4IDz1moITzSEJpFx1oTSnS8k2K9r9Bb7MU8C4KXvdySv-1Lhu1av0zPjIbwk10J4eQJyRtsF89M)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
As we celebrate Thanksgiving today, we wanted to say thank y ou!
This cycle, we undertook the herculean effort to elect Democratic Secretaries of State, we were dependent on the support of grassroots Democrats like you. And with your help, we: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_1112422_b1_Thanksgiving_30ac&amount=5]
→ Defeated election-deniers in swing states from Arizona to Michigan,
→ Elected pro-democracy champions like Adrian Fontes and Jocelyn Benson,
→ And defended our democracy from unprecedented attacks.
Yes, it took a lot of hard work. But democracy is worth fighting for. And we’re prepared and ready to fight against anti-democracy candidates again.
Thank you,
Team DASS
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955830:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955831:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955832:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955833:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955834:JaydjYGWN:m:1:3331421248:FEB85D3F95CE89C0D36D1B74E7837843:r)

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Warmest wishes this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Happy Thanksgiving, friend!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55037642/380488390/-1564866738?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5115-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODE0NDAyZC0xYTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULPEOcsvanBSIM2AxhsmYw7I8ZKbI-89FvH7Qf6DvAA=)
**Happy Thanksgiving, friend!**
Today, I am especially grateful for you and this entire grassroots team. You have stood by my side as we've fought together for a better, brighter future for our country. I simply would not be in a position to win Georgia's critical runoff election in just 12 days without your support. _Thank you._

There's no question that it's been a busy year, and I'm looking forward to sharing some delicious food with my loved ones. **But before I do that, I wanted to quickly reach out about an organization that is doing critical work: the Georgia Food Bank Association.**
The Georgia Food Bank Association is leading a statewide effort to end hunger in our state. Through local initiatives and food banks, they provide food from farm to table, directly to people in need.
**[If you're able, will you make a donation to the Georgia Food Bank Association and join me in helping those in need? Any amount you can pitch in today will make a big difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55037643/380488398/-1564866738?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5115-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODE0NDAyZC0xYTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULPEOcsvanBSIM2AxhsmYw7I8ZKbI-89FvH7Qf6DvAA=)**
I hope your Thanksgiving is filled with peace and rest. I am sending my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was recently in Georgia because it’s THAT important. You should help, too. |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ea4bd4c3a6a24dcaa771abcb18a01e0e&_e=Lr-pSyIK8HONX71Logh9bQoXofdUliP1XyFZyAYXnTXI7GkZTbwGQi5I_R-o3IxH81k9so6z0RYcR_vhgaNM24yaq66qHcjB2iFZ05trcf3CaLIxghznEZyf6h49hcCsWSNuc_qtfIzS1bfokSyhwfdXYCs1o6bA3l6Kv9mTECW4PQx9sqo5_AO08rTrZa1UaMlvAFK7XpltZMT6TpAihe2RQcHbiu6NSMrFa9ThOpHMdayzO5OBgH5Nl0eMqlrcTXYIMDaHBgyucJQXl1u6t3GnPAbFIUemdK6P5faPB9wMQCRRoxp7XnExvMqovNCdXDLpM14rZjcOFvvcuyySavJyLg4vUCG_FKDsglWJSulBwnLFVnhmkyLrFyKqP-T0ZJeF5mQap0UGifZs-xPq3Sj15rHjeGsjSVCizQxJ0K_msQG04VJ99lXUlIKuxp_D)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Fellow American._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ea4bd4c3a6a24dcaa771abcb18a01e0e&_e=Lr-pSyIK8HONX71Logh9bQoXofdUliP1XyFZyAYXnTXI7GkZTbwGQi5I_R-o3IxH81k9so6z0RYcR_vhgaNM24yaq66qHcjB2iFZ05trcf3CaLIxghznEZyf6h49hcCsWSNuc_qtfIzS1bfokSyhwfdXYCs1o6bA3l6Kv9mTECW4PQx9sqo5_AO08rTrZa1UaMlvAFK7XpltZMT6TpAihe2RQcHbiu6NSMrFa9ThOpHMdayzO5OBgH5Nl0eMqlrcTXYIMDaHBgyucJQXl1u6t3GnPAbFIUemdK6P5faPB9xJc5SlLjCclPYzQlAVY38Fr-5j9JDrT11bY-sZlkKNkdKs7OhGs76jbxd3ZIeGK6fcHBv90Z53B7VbVJphhLIxo7QgsooB2f7mQu8LZPjGgIpbBhJIofp-hlwRzacveCbYXYmdnPx9HnSsig5PASEd)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $5, $10, or $34.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ea4bd4c3a6a24dcaa771abcb18a01e0e&_e=Lr-pSyIK8HONX71Logh9bQoXofdUliP1XyFZyAYXnTXI7GkZTbwGQi5I_R-o3IxH81k9so6z0RYcR_vhgaNM24yaq66qHcjB2iFZ05trcf3CaLIxghznEZyf6h49hcCsWSNuc_qtfIzS1bfokSyhwfdXYCs1o6bA3l6Kv9mTECW4PQx9sqo5_AO08rTrZa1UaMlvAFK7XpltZMT6TpAihe2RQcHbiu6NSMrFa9ThOpHMdayzO5OBgH5Nl0eMqlrcTXYIMDaHBgyucJQXl1u6t3GnPAbFIUemdK6P5faPB9xp6_5uc8XUBW-nuZdj22gVj48G0XzSPgMAtZUYDjfn43CdlEAv2IEsbVBB-v1o2nY_hxhPOHQp0y7RnuIwOOclEOQsASkg1kQrgZB5dOBdNjkDu_WNeK8RXrLyl-vNp9Jpq5C7IVZOWyPnUGc7-I8s)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

clean_body: I was recently in Georgia because it’s THAT important. You should help, too. | The country is counting on Georgia. It's Georgia or bust, Fellow American. I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's that important. No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you. The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. We cannot let them be successful. If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year. Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately. The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY. disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=be3d08f88ace458d817a99acf2197b2a&_e=f62xeYFazDLjEvlZbVzRRBk5jvpFBGVKs_XK5viLMD0J6P4j-CG_CoW_OE5B8u5hxT5mKqmt9Y6AG2kHShnn6avqkbc6uM8i554zIvEaWZ0ZFdkJgIHWft9GH0HBqVyiEfjytcGlb6_qMql8pfBioT3_W2U7-XMuIscg9Lt7hl9C311G5FxpL5qM5ByfSE5b)

Hey Peter,

I'm sure many of you aren't checking your email today, but I wanted to reach out and say Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you are able to spend today with family, friends, and good food!

Today, we celebrate the blessings of the past year. For me, these blessings are unmatched. I am blessed beyond words to have your support and be Ohio's Senator-elect.

Today, we celebrate America. We give thanks for the blessings and freedoms that God has granted us.

I have so many thanks to give today, and one of them is to you. Thank you for your continued support!

I hope you take a moment to reflect on everything we as Americans have to be thankful for.

God bless,

JD

| Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc.
---

| | Happy Thanksgiving, friend! Today, I send you my deepest gratitude and well wishes. **It’s the honor of my life to represent Michigan’s working families, and thanks to your support I have the opportunity to continue fighting for you for years to come.** Together, we’ve continued to help manufacturers, workers and small businesses thrive in Michigan’s 11th District, and I could not be more thankful that you’ve had my back through it all. I know we still have a long way to go and so much left to achieve, but with this team by my side, I am confident we’ll continue pushing Michigan—and our country—forward. **So, before you go on to spend time with your friends, family and loved ones today, I want you to know how thankful I am to have you on the team.** Gratefully, Haley Stevens [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55038097/380490012/2012793621?refcode=EM_BS_STE_221124_FR_Thanksgiving_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJjZjAxMy0xZjZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSZ-6mz7AjP5AkMPk1bqElxEUA3aWmH_7V77VQbl5Bo=) | | | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55038098/380490013/2012793621?refcode=EM_BS_STE_221124_FR_Thanksgiving_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJjZjAxMy0xZjZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSZ-6mz7AjP5AkMPk1bqElxEUA3aWmH_7V77VQbl5Bo=)

It’s the honor of my life to represent Michigan’s working families, and thanks to your support I have the opportunity to continue fighting for you for years to come. I know we still have a long way to go and so much left to achieve, but with this team by my side, I am confident we’ll continue pushing Michigan—and our country—forward. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: I have a lot to be thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This year, I'm lucky to have a lot of things to be thankful for, and I wanted to share a few with you: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55038416/380491025/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTU4MzRkYS0yMTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Y0L7F9yB_vHxqJdY6GJjSum2v4SUCX2Jd-3D09lO2k=&emci=5e49402c-6767-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e95834da-216c-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter:

Before over-stuffing our bellies with Thanksgiving dinner and pumpkin pie, one of our family traditions is to share with each other something we are particularly grateful for.

This year, I'm blessed with so many things to be thankful for, and I wanted to share a few with you:

I'm thankful for my family, and in particular for my husband, David, and son, Sam. Their love and support mean the world to me, and I'm grateful to have this special day to spend with them.

I'm thankful for this grassroots team. Everyone who volunteered, knocked doors, called friends, donated, or simply cast their vote in the midterm elections – thank you. You're the reason we beat the odds earlier this month and kept Washington's 8th District blue.

And I'm thankful to have the opportunity to continue serving the 8th District. It is the honor of my life to serve as your congresswoman, and I look forward to returning to D.C. to fight for the issues that matter most to you.

However you're celebrating Thanksgiving this year, I hope you'll join me in remembering all that we have to be grateful for.

Have a safe and happy Thanksgiving,

Kim
| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…” 😮
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952328:Jr6CQYGNf:m:1:3370555685:BA01E8AC2E6598DE4E7397D624C166B0:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952328:Jr6CQYGNf:m:1:3370555685:BA01E8AC2E6598DE4E7397D624C166B0:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952328:Jr6CQYGNf:m:1:3370555685:BA01E8AC2E6598DE4E7397D624C166B0:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952328:Jr6CQYGNf:m:1:3370555685:BA01E8AC2E6598DE4E7397D624C166B0:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Before our regular programming resumes, here are some important political stories as we head into the holiday weekend …
body:
Need a news fix today?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d88871b-aa50-43bd-a867-15e1e53ed24c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Happy Thanksgiving and thank you for being a part of The Blue Amp Action community! We’re so grateful to have all of you with us in the work to build an America that lives up to its founding promises. Before our regular programming resumes, here are some important stories going into the holiday weekend, just in case you needed a news fix today: * Crime has either stopped happening or was never the issue FoxNews pretended before the election. [Fox segments on the issue are down ~60%. Weird, it's almost like they're a propaganda channel that was doing it strictly for political reasons?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26888c5c-2ce9-4a63-b71c-e2f39206eccc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Serj Tankanian, lead singer for grammy-award winning (& 3x Billboard album chart-topping) heavy metal band "System of a Down" wrote a [MUST REA](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1dbb982-40dc-4f4a-b860-d89280930b11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[D piece on how Putin, Turkey's Erdogan & Azerbaijani autocrat Aliyev are murdering Armenians and pushing for new territory. It is just like what Putin's doing in Ukraine, yet the world is mostly ignoring it. Read and share this piece!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0edf54a1-930f-433b-afc9-24370352c419/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * After the horrific mass shooting in Colorado Springs, you'd think some might be more careful with their words. [Not Kari Lake. She's made up so many lies & conspiracies, top Maricopa County Election official Bill Gates had to get police protection and go into hiding. There truly is no bottom](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01693d8a-03ae-4417-90a7-aaf0757b8287/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for these monsters. * Speaking of the shooting, the hero who tackled the shooter, Rich Fierro, is a vet & liberal. He & his wife Jess own a microbrewery where she's brewmaster. [With holidays requiring presents coming up, how about getting a "Diversity: It's On Tap" or other cool merch to support this hero and their values!? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4009fc8e-08cd-491a-b811-d453132ca699/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Oliver Willis, the [brilliant Black writer, has written an important piece on why "Herschel Walker's vile campaign is an insult to Black Americans everywhere." Read it!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44e27735-b950-4d2b-a254-e21067d410be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That's it for now. But more to come soon. Happy Thanksgiving, to all of you and your loved ones! Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c051884-32e4-499e-ab1c-30cf6102d17a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Collective PAC
subject: A few things we’re thankful for this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8SiPD700dSy1eHN7Ej07Dk1WOXm_gqSEFQOPaCP2L1BeVkQP12q8Cga8Kwg3gPOUer9HaOvYhDfVTcXIhP0338z3lgbGZSLtxCjM8bTnyv2M4OFMgtBmnLMMMRZ5ktwrHSvwDL_Kev66o4lq_DOCw3WiIHd4KTlbyPupOFB2_yWMzn9G-A8hlJvBxNmSnTT2EH54h7kDgepnIJ_lKRgBdoZyzaHPsva82n5tPmOAyvOvg7XLsFagjAmX7qDMrjOdSZWFze9RlXbv2iDWHHsHwP5aQWwWKfeXblndME74e700JqAMC6eadNw1O8vZx0RoEk8h42Kvl9S8dWbWCiN_fwc/3rf/3DMcOAgbQSSP82a8L3b18w/h0/FIjwXlOwRDrI8hYMKzKi26GvqwKUAEZ-B0Gg3_re30w)

| | Peter,

We hope that you are having a safe and relaxing Thanksgiving with your loved ones. We wanted to reach out and share a few things for which all of us here at The Collective PAC are thankful — not just today, but every day.

First, we’re thankful for **you**. This shouldn’t come as a surprise to you, Peter. Without grassroots supporters like you giving us your time, effort, and financial support, it wouldn’t be possible for us to build Black political power across the country and at all levels of government.

Second, we’re thankful for **our candidates** , whose service nationwide will make all the difference in creating a government that is truly representative of its people and protecting the fundamental rights of **_all_** Americans.

Finally, we’re thankful for **the progress we’ve made** in this election cycle. From electing the first Black governor of Maryland to investing over $1,000,000 for federal and statewide candidates to contacting 2.6 million Black voters directly through phone banking and text banking to encourage them to turn out to the polls, we couldn’t be prouder of what we’ve accomplished and the work we continue to do.

On behalf of the whole team here at The Collective PAC, thank you for supporting our mission so ardently, and we wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving.

— The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iQjwIvKCNDXuGp0ewJysplLlGNxHxnhwXMF-JVNbtzi8kpBnZCcLjU8yisuMu09ZZS3lp3RGzie3VrMgrfFS4HbhOIYsLrY3yjERUYvnffOcLwiB8UYuZrRnXBhvXQ1aPmja_H_JHpVK-yA6AJyAlS7phvDqPKfDex0SPYDs5CI0jaDIqhdUW0zEqQvBJe4C5sQhY-_k_L9a5CVCUsGevTzkMFiBzGgDBqIER6li0VJgUE0VuZcjVwyAosFH0e5WEKvlxyCZRYpu23UhlGSN8BjPKb08pSg5bg-ZU2b92JzLZf7Wpf6B347t7Lm5-Rjfug/3rf/3DMcOAgbQSSP82a8L3b18w/h1/apuTrzrWq1GeEioygc6-xwR4d56TDmQFI84puIv7Auo) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We have two tasks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was recently in Georgia because it’s THAT important. You should help, too. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c63a0d17ab14b839baf19464b315d52&_e=2qEXngRz2CYubqsqNdFELXT79fFK-OcaEvpslmxLWSDUR-qIY6gk6NGyVu-dpClRtAdw77mF81g8mOM-Iobtcx4OeQmG6fe0qv5BSebIUKfd06M61Kx1r-11oiWM64uEGgKu8w7Bk5hRLmuie-vtu_GStQivF08yc0-R_fytEzi_7FXafV-c2d2E5oXqmaFgpY03tK_XTgP4SJXrehLdOvYnoDSMaiaqko7BGzeB4C9ENoEOOSg7rvrGZtEutOI_C40oV2L-bNDB9QkNVIAcJMj5XuwJc3GTwrY9fFg9uUpyxSXomWpP7P25OqVRYkPNa62AEDyHK83_quYrfYHXdMDzR4CQSJu__8IYRCKgV-Vda3iH5UzYNgmcINtwaSDZW1clpQRyb-VJvrVQLgJNs9a3ixwXCk1tvvC13fppHrn3p4HVrGOAotbPTncN6LcU)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Fellow American._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…” 😮
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952307:JbQYTYGNk:m:1:3371220873:FCA73D38C66E057160676F3D1F5987D6:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952307:JbQYTYGNk:m:1:3371220873:FCA73D38C66E057160676F3D1F5987D6:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952307:JbQYTYGNk:m:1:3371220873:FCA73D38C66E057160676F3D1F5987D6:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952307:JbQYTYGNk:m:1:3371220873:FCA73D38C66E057160676F3D1F5987D6:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
May your holiday be full of joy and family.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: From me and mine
body:
| | | | To you and yours
---
---
Dear Peter,

As a nation, we have been through some pretty significant challenges over the past couple of years.

Yet, we still have so much to be thankful for. While our freedoms are under constant attack, I’m thankful we still live in the greatest country in the world — where freedom rings and opportunity abounds.

I’m thankful for the service men and women who are not sitting around a table with their families this Thanksgiving. Instead, they are all around the world protecting our God given rights and standing up for the American Dream. I’m also thankful for my family and friends and all those who keep me grounded in what matters most so that I remain inspired to fight everyday for your freedoms, our Constitution, and the rule of law.

Finally, I am thankful for supporters like you, Peter. You have helped me and put yourself on the front lines by supporting our efforts to defend West Virginia and America. That’s not something I take lightly. Remember that I am not entitled to any of your support, but I am grateful for it.

Of course we have much to be concerned about our future and the constant attacks on our way of life. But today we celebrate the many things we are thankful for.

So from my family to you and yours — Happy Thanksgiving!
---
---
Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General

---
---

Friend,
From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving!

__**I have so much to be thankful for this year, especially the support of the people of Wyoming.**__ Because of you and everyone across our great state we have reclaimed Wyoming’s lone congressional seat. I am looking forward to serving you.
---

clean_body: | | | | We have a lot to be thankful for| Friend, From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving! I have so much to be thankful for this year, especially the support of the people of Wyoming. Because of you and everyone across our great state we have reclaimed Wyoming’s lone congressional seat. I am looking forward to serving you. With our Republican Majority, we will finally get to work on fixing this economy, protecting our energy industry, and securing our border. Enjoy today with your loved ones! Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Kristi Noem
subject: Get your exclusive SIGNED copy of my new memoir
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Peter.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952121:JbKa8YGNj:m:1:3317145305:3B0327920F9F90EEA7BDB3CE9D0C7ED0:r "Claim your signed
copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952121:JbKa8YGNj:m:1:3317145305:3B0327920F9F90EEA7BDB3CE9D0C7ED0:r "Kristi Noem book image")
---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952121:JbKa8YGNj:m:1:3317145305:3B0327920F9F90EEA7BDB3CE9D0C7ED0:r "CLAIM YOUR
SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952121:JbKa8YGNj:m:1:3317145305:3B0327920F9F90EEA7BDB3CE9D0C7ED0:r "But I can’t sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this
exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem
**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: You don’t have a choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950464:J3-mkYGNH:m:1:3373497171:AABD0B96CF22ED1D55BC845AC884D3D2:r)

name: (2) me, Sarah
subject: Top GOP leaders are asking about you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Peter,
I emailed you earlier but never got a response, so I'm following up once more because top GOP leaders are asking about you.
We need every single grassroots Patriot who helped Republicans take back the House to endorse our [**OFFICIAL 2023 Priorities**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952221:JdMxkYGN7:m:1:3317145305:5DF5B5FE5A654AE2FF37533FDED2E7A2:r)** ** and your name is missing! We need 100% participation before new members of Congress are sworn into office -- _no exceptions._
[**Can you please take just a moment to review our official GOP list of priorities in 2023 and pick YOUR MOST IMPORTANT ONE?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952221:JdMxkYGN7:m:1:3317145305:5DF5B5FE5A654AE2FF37533FDED2E7A2:r) If yours is missing, we need to know immediately so GOP leaders have enough time to assess and revise our official priorities. Otherwise, please choose ONE of the following priorities below:
**2023 GOP PRIORITIES**
****
**SECURE OUR BORDER
ROOT OUT PARTISAN BIAS IN THE FBI
EXPOSE DEMOCRAT CORRUPTION
PRESERVE THE LIVES OF UNBORN CHILDREN
DEFEND RELIGIOUS LIBERTY
STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN OUR SCHOOLS
LOWER TAXES FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE
REBUILD AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE
DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY**
****
****[CHOOSE ONE OF THESE GOP PRIORITIES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952222:JdMxkYGN7:m:1:3317145305:5DF5B5FE5A654AE2FF37533FDED2E7A2:r)****
****
[**Please, let us know if your top priority is represented here for Republican leaders. If you DON 'T see your top priority listed, please proceed to the following link to let GOP leaders know right away!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952222:JdMxkYGN7:m:1:3317145305:5DF5B5FE5A654AE2FF37533FDED2E7A2:r)
As one of our top Patriots, you are the lifeblood of our Conservative movement. GOP leaders are eager to get to work to save America, but they need your endorsement to know where to start.
We can't save America without you!
Thank you,
Sarah
Republican HQ

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Georgia or bust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61950459:63fo6YGwN:m:1:3374012347:29D500636B006C828954C78D834FBC35:r)

body:
Making history in Georgia!
| **We told you** Raphael Warnock is headed to another runoff election!

**And we told you** if we win this runoff, we’ll EXPAND our Senate majority.

**Now we’re ecstatic... _because TOP Democrats really STEPPED UP!_ But we can’t slow down for even one minute:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35830?t=6&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs) | [**WE’RE EXTENDING OUR GOAL BY $10,000 TO LOCK-IN A WIN. CHIP IN $7 TO HELP DEMOCRATS LIKE WARNOCK WIN THEIR RUNOFFS AND EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35831?t=7&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs)
---
**Listen, we can’t take our foot off the gas just yet.**

If Trump-endorsed MAGA stooge Herschel Walker seizes this seat, we’ll be stuck in the same legislative gridlock we’ve seen for the past 2 years!

Sen. Warnock is our __best chance__ at expanding our Senate majority. Without his victory, Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema will control Biden’s agenda...

**_So we can’t let the momentum slow down now!_**
[Look, the GOP will stop at NOTHING to destroy our progress, so we’re raising the bar. Chip in $7 RIGHT NOW to our extended $10,000 goal to help Democrats like Warnock win their runoffs and expand our Senate majority! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35832?t=8&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs)
**_EXTENDED GOAL:_ $10,000 || _DEADLINE:_ TONIGHT**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35831?t=9&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs)

Our proven work is helping keep Sen. Warnock afloat, but he won't be able to win without your help! We're raising an emergency $15,000 to help Democrats like Raphael Warnock fight back against the MAGA mob, and we need your help today.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to expand our Senate majority by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22291?t=1&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help Senate Democrats month after month, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22292?t=2&akid=5496%2E878179%2EbDj1hs)!**

name: Kristi Noem
subject: Act now to secure your signed copy, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Peter.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955991:JEj8pYGHN:m:1:3331703221:E8D04CFC12E767B3725F5DA139E448BD:r "Claim your signed
copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955991:JEj8pYGHN:m:1:3331703221:E8D04CFC12E767B3725F5DA139E448BD:r "Kristi Noem book image")
---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955991:JEj8pYGHN:m:1:3331703221:E8D04CFC12E767B3725F5DA139E448BD:r "CLAIM YOUR
SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61955991:JEj8pYGHN:m:1:3331703221:E8D04CFC12E767B3725F5DA139E448BD:r "But I can’t sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this
exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem

# [Thanksgiving, Thangs Taken, and Why I'm Grateful Today](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=86651877&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODY2NTE4NzcsImlhdCI6MTY2OTMyNjQwNCwiZXhwIjoxNjcxOTE4NDA0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.MGY2NhdicaidjTV8KmaR8BJIW84LTC09wWgH25msJAY)
### A holiday with brutal and racist origins can still offer something positive if embraced with the right intention
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/a0f60a02-c559-4a52-be27-0cbae6f4a0a0?r=1hvr60)
---
| Nov 24| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0f60a02-c559-4a52-be27-0cbae6f4a0a0?r=1hvr60)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=86651877&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODY2NTE4NzcsInJlYWN0aW9uIjoi4p2kIiwiaWF0IjoxNjY5MzI2NDA0LCJleHAiOjE2NzE5MTg0MDQsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0xMDE4NTk3Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.N2g30bTqPgGrr0x085tyt9vRTRUlI-5rbFRw9rFvLs4&utm_medium=email)
